0,AMZN,Information Technology,"Amazon.com, Inc.",1641026945024.0,1608000.0,"Amazon.com, Inc. engages in the retail sale of consumer products and subscriptions in North America and internationally. The company operates through three segments: North America, International, and Amazon Web Services (AWS). It sells merchandise and content purchased for resale from third-party sellers through physical and online stores. The company also manufactures and sells electronic devices, including Kindle, Fire tablets, Fire TVs, Rings, and Echo and other devices; provides Kindle Direct Publishing, an online service that allows independent authors and publishers to make their books available in the Kindle Store; and develops and produces media content. In addition, it offers programs that enable sellers to sell their products on its websites, as well as its stores; and programs that allow authors, musicians, filmmakers, Twitch streamers, skill and app developers, and others to publish and sell content. Further, the company provides compute, storage, database, analytics, machine learning, and other services, as well as fulfillment, advertising, publishing, and digital content subscriptions. Additionally, it offers Amazon Prime, a membership program, which provides free shipping of various items; access to streaming of movies and series; and other services. The company serves consumers, sellers, developers, enterprises, and content creators. Amazon.com, Inc. was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Seattle, Washington.",United States,https://www.amazon.com,0.28806,928.502,271.601,,1.114665
1,MSFT,Information Technology,Microsoft Corporation,2252284624896.0,181000.0,"Microsoft Corporation develops, licenses, and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide. Its Intelligent Cloud segment licenses SQL, Windows Servers, Visual Studio, System Center, and related CALs; GitHub that provides a collaboration platform and code hosting service for developers; and Azure, a cloud platform. It also offers support services and Microsoft consulting services to assist customers in developing, deploying, and managing Microsoft server and desktop solutions; and training and certification on Microsoft products. It also offers Surface, PC accessories, PCs, tablets, gaming and entertainment consoles, and other devices; Gaming, including Xbox hardware, and Xbox content and services; video games and third-party video game royalties; and Search, including Bing and Microsoft advertising. It sells its products through OEMs, distributors, and resellers; and directly through digital marketplaces, online stores, and retail stores. It has collaborations with Dynatrace, Inc., Morgan Stanley, Micro Focus, WPP plc, ACI Worldwide, Inc., and iCIMS, Inc., as well as strategic relationships with Avaya Holdings Corp. and wejo Limited. 6,AMD,Information Technology,"Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.",184640258048.0,15500.0,"Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. operates as a semiconductor company worldwide. 34,BAC,Financial,Bank of America Corporation,345982500864.0,208000.0,"Bank of America Corporation, through its subsidiaries, provides banking and financial products and services for individual consumers, small and middle-market businesses, institutional investors, large corporations, and governments worldwide. 35,WFC,Financial,Wells Fargo & Company,196144660480.0,247848.0,"Wells Fargo & Company, a diversified financial services company, provides banking, investment, mortgage, and consumer and commercial finance products and services in the United States and internationally. It operates through four segments: Consumer Banking and Lending; Commercial Banking; Corporate and Investment Banking; and Wealth and Investment Management. The Consumer Banking and Lending segment offers diversified financial products and services for consumers and small businesses. Its financial products and services include checking and savings accounts, and credit and debit cards, as well as home, auto, personal, and small business lending services. The Commercial Banking segment provides financial solutions to private, family owned, and certain public companies. Its products and services include banking and credit products across various industry sectors and municipalities, secured lending and lease products, and treasury management services. The Corporate and Investment Banking segment offers a suite of capital markets, banking, and financial products and services to corporate, commercial real estate, government, and institutional clients. Its products and services comprise corporate banking, investment banking, treasury management, commercial real estate lending and servicing, equity, and fixed income solutions, as well as sales, trading, and research capabilities services. The Wealth and Investment Management segment provides personalized wealth management, brokerage, financial planning, lending, private banking, and trust and fiduciary products and services to affluent, high-net worth, and ultra-high-net worth clients. It also operates through financial advisors. Wells Fargo & Company was founded in 1852 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.",United States,https://www.wellsfargo.com,0.12366,20.421,43.285,,1.178149
36,SCHW,Financial,The Charles Schwab Corporation,163315810304.0,33400.0,"The Charles Schwab Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides wealth management, securities brokerage, banking, asset management, custody, and financial advisory services. The company operates in two segments, Investor Services and Advisor Services. The Advisor Services segment offers custodial, trading, banking, and support services; and retirement business and corporate brokerage retirement services. This segment provides brokerage accounts with equity and fixed income, margin lending, options, and futures and forex trading; cash management capabilities comprising third-party certificates of deposit; third-party and proprietary mutual funds; plus mutual fund trading and clearing services; and exchange-traded funds (ETFs), including proprietary and third-party ETFs. It also offers advice solutions, such as managed portfolios of proprietary and third-party mutual funds and ETFs, separately managed accounts, customized personal advice for tailored portfolios, and specialized planning and portfolio management. In addition, this segment provides banking products and services, including checking and savings accounts, first lien residential real estate mortgage loans, home equity lines of credit, and pledged asset lines; and trust services comprising trust custody services, personal trust reporting services, and administrative trustee services. 38,BLK,Financial,"BlackRock, Inc.",112296706048.0,18400.0,"BlackRock, Inc. is a publicly owned investment manager. The firm primarily provides its services to institutional, intermediary, and individual investors including corporate, public, union, and industry pension plans, insurance companies, third-party mutual funds, endowments, public institutions, governments, foundations, charities, sovereign wealth funds, corporations, official institutions, and banks. It also provides global risk management and advisory services. The firm manages separate client-focused equity, fixed income, and balanced portfolios. It also launches and manages open-end and closed-end mutual funds, offshore funds, unit trusts, and alternative investment vehicles including structured funds. The firm launches equity, fixed income, balanced, and real estate mutual funds. It also launches equity, fixed income, balanced, currency, commodity, and multi-asset exchange traded funds. The firm also launches and manages hedge funds. It invests in the public equity, fixed income, real estate, currency, commodity, and alternative markets across the globe. The firm primarily invests in growth and value stocks of small-cap, mid-cap, SMID-cap, large-cap, and multi-cap companies. It also invests in dividend-paying equity securities. The firm invests in investment grade municipal securities, government securities including securities issued or guaranteed by a government or a government agency or instrumentality, corporate bonds, and asset-backed and mortgage-backed securities. It employs fundamental and quantitative analysis with a focus on bottom-up and top-down approach to make its investments. The firm employs liquidity, asset allocation, balanced, real estate, and alternative strategies to make its investments. In real estate sector, it seeks to invest in Poland and Germany. The firm benchmarks the performance of its portfolios against various S&P, Russell, Barclays, MSCI, Citigroup, and Merrill Lynch indices. BlackRock, Inc. was founded in 1988 and is based in New York City with additional offices in Boston, Massachusetts; London, United Kingdom; Gurgaon, India; Hong Kong; Greenwich, Connecticut; Princeton, New Jersey; Edinburgh, United Kingdom; Sydney, Australia; Taipei, Taiwan; Singapore; Sao Paulo, Brazil; Philadelphia, Pennsylvania; Washington, District of Columbia; Toronto, Canada; Wilmington, Delaware; and San Francisco, California.",United States,https://www.blackrock.com,0.16212,127.263,248.496,,1.236712

# D3.js Bubble Chart with Tooltips

## Bubble Sizing by Data Value
"'```javascript
const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
  .domain([0, d3.max(data, d => d.marketCap)])
  .range([5, 50]);
```
Use `scaleSqrt` so bubble area is proportional to value.

## Color by Category
```javascript
const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
  .domain(sectors)
  .range(d3.schemeTableau10);
```

## Tooltip Pattern (D3 v6)
```javascript
const tooltip = d3.select("body").append("div")
  .attr("class", "tooltip")
  .style("opacity", 0)
  .style("position", "absolute");

bubbles.on("mouseover", (event, d) => {
    tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0.95);
    tooltip.html(`<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>${d.sector}`)
      .style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
      .style("top", (event.pageY - 28) + "px");
  })
  .on("mouseout", () => {
    tooltip.transition().duration(300).style("opacity", 0);
  });
```

## Labels Inside Bubbles
```javascript
svg.selectAll("text.label")
  .data(nodes)
  .join("text")
  .attr("class", "label")
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("dy", "0.35em")
  .style("font-size", d => Math.max(8, radius(d) / 2.5) + "px")
  .text(d => d.ticker);
```

## Legend
```javascript
const legend = svg.selectAll(".legend")
  .data(sectors)
  .join("g")
  .attr("transform", (d, i) => `translate(10, ${20 + i * 22})`);
legend.append("rect").attr("width", 14).attr("height", 14)
  .attr("fill", d => colorScale(d));
legend.append("text").attr("x", 20).attr("y", 12).text(d => d);
```

# D3.js Data Table with Chart Interaction

## Building a Data Table with D3
"'```javascript
const table = d3.select("#table-container").append("table");
const thead = table.append("thead").append("tr");
const columns = ["Ticker", "Name", "Sector", "Market Cap"];
thead.selectAll("th").data(columns).join("th").text(d => d);

const tbody = table.append("tbody");
const rows = tbody.selectAll("tr").data(data).join("tr")
  .attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker);
rows.selectAll("td").data(d => [d.ticker, d.name, d.sector, formatCap(d.marketCap)])
  .join("td").text(d => d);
```

## Market Cap Formatting
```javascript
function formatMarketCap(val) {
  if (!val) return "N/A";
  if (val >= 1e12) return (val / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
  if (val >= 1e9) return (val / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
  if (val >= 1e6) return (val / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
  return val.toLocaleString();
}
```

## Bidirectional Click Interaction
```javascript
// Click bubble → highlight table row
bubbles.on("click", (event, d) => {
  d3.selectAll("table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.selectAll("circle").classed("selected", false);
  d3.select(event.currentTarget).classed("selected", true);
  const row = d3.select(`tr[data-ticker="${d.ticker}"]`);
  row.classed("highlighted", true);
  row.node().scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
});

// Click table row → highlight bubble
rows.on("click", (event, d) => {
  d3.selectAll("table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.selectAll("circle").classed("selected", false);
  d3.select(event.currentTarget).classed("highlighted", true);
  d3.select(`circle[data-ticker="${d.ticker}"]`).classed("selected", true);
});
```

# CSV Parsing with D3.js

## Loading CSV Files
"'```javascript
// D3 v6 uses promises
const data = await d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv", d => ({
  ticker: d.ticker,
  sector: d.sector,
  name: d["full name"],
  marketCap: +d.marketCap || null,
  country: d.country || null,
  website: d.website || null
}));
```

## Handling Missing Values
ETFs have empty marketCap, country, website fields. Use `+d.field || null` to convert empty strings to null.

## Embedding CSV Data
For reliability, embed parsed data as JSON directly in the JS file to avoid CORS/path issues:
```javascript
const stockData = [
  { ticker: "AAPL", sector: "Information Technology", name: "Apple Inc.", marketCap: 2676055080960 },
  // ...
];
```

# Single-Page Web App Structure for D3 Visualizations

## Directory Layout
"'```
output/
├── index.html          # Main HTML page
├── js/
│   ├── d3.v6.min.js    # D3 library
│   └── visualization.js # Custom visualization code
├── css/
│   └── style.css       # Styles
└── data/               # Data files
```

## HTML Template
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Stock Visualization</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
</head>
<body>
  <div class="container">
    <div id="bubble-chart"></div>
    <div id="data-table"></div>
  </div>
  <script src="js/d3.v6.min.js"></script>
  <script src="js/visualization.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

## Side-by-Side Layout CSS
```css
.container {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  padding: 20px;
}
#bubble-chart { flex: 1; }
#data-table { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 90vh; }
```

# D3.js Force Simulation for Bubble Charts

## Overview
D3.js v6 force simulation positions nodes using physics-based forces. Ideal for bubble/cluster charts where items group by category.

## Key Forces

### forceX / forceY — Cluster by Category
Position bubbles toward category-specific coordinates:
"'```javascript
const sectorCenters = { "Tech": 200, "Finance": 400 };
simulation.force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorCenters[d.sector]).strength(0.3))
          .force("y", d3.forceY(height / 2).strength(0.3));
```

### forceCollide — Prevent Overlap
```javascript
simulation.force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radiusScale(d.value) + 1.5));
```

### forceCenter — Keep clusters centered
```javascript
simulation.force("center", d3.forceCenter(width / 2, height / 2));
```

## Full Pattern
```javascript
const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => xCenter(d.category)).strength(0.4))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(d => yCenter(d.category)).strength(0.4))
  .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radius(d) + 2).strength(0.8))
  .on("tick", () => {
    bubbles.attr("cx", d => d.x).attr("cy", d => d.y);
    labels.attr("x", d => d.x).attr("y", d => d.y);
  });
```

## Tips
- Use `.strength(0.3–0.5)` for forceX/forceY to keep clusters tight but not rigid
- forceCollide strength ~0.8 prevents overlap well
- Run ~300 ticks with `simulation.alpha(1).restart()` for stable layout
- Arrange sector centers in a grid or circle pattern for clean clustering

* {

  flex: 1.2;

  padding: 12px;

  width: 100%;

  flex: 1;

  max-height: 85vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}

thead {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 2;
}

thead th {
  background: #1a1a2e;
  color: #fff;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 600;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

tbody tr {
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}

tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #f9fafb;
}

tbody tr:hover {
  background: #e8edf3;
}

tbody tr.highlighted {
  background: #fff3cd "'!important;
  outline: 2px solid #f0ad4e;
}

tbody td {
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

circle {
  cursor: pointer;
  stroke: #fff;
  stroke-width: 1.5;
  transition: stroke-width 0.15s, stroke 0.15s;
}

circle.selected {
  stroke: #f0ad4e;
  stroke-width: 3.5;
}

.tooltip {
  position: absolute;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.92);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;

  z-index: 100;

}

.bubble-label {
  pointer-events: none;

  dominant-baseline: central;
  fill: #fff;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.legend-item text {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  fill: #333;
}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_24","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/output/js/visualization.js << 'JSEOF'
(async function () {
  // ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  function formatMarketCap(val) {
    if ("'!val && val !== 0) return "N/A";
    if (val >= 1e12) return (val / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
    if (val >= 1e9) return (val / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
    if (val >= 1e6) return (val / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
    return val.toLocaleString();
  }

  // ── Load data ────────────────────────────────────────────
  const raw = await d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv");
  const data = raw.map(d => ({
    ticker: d.ticker,
    sector: d.sector,
    name: d["full name"],
    marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
    country: d.country || null,
    website: d.website || null
  }));

  // ── Sectors & colors ────────────────────────────────────
  const sectors = [...new Set(data.map(d => d.sector))];
  const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
    .domain(sectors)
    .range(["#4e79a7", "#f28e2b", "#e15759", "#76b7b2", "#59a14f",
            "#edc948", "#b07aa1", "#ff9da7", "#9c755f", "#bab0ac"]);

  // ── Bubble chart dimensions ──────────────────────────────
  const width = 700, height = 620;
  const svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")
    .append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${width} ${height}`)
    .attr("preserveAspectRatio", "xMidYMid meet");

  // ── Radius scale (sqrt so area ∝ value) ──────────────────
  const nonEtf = data.filter(d => d.marketCap);
  const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
    .domain([0, d3.max(nonEtf, d => d.marketCap)])
    .range([6, 52]);

  const ETF_RADIUS = 14;
  function radius(d) {
    return d.marketCap ? radiusScale(d.marketCap) : ETF_RADIUS;
  }

  // ── Sector center positions (grid layout) ────────────────
  const cols = 3;
  const padX = 160, padY = 130;
  const gapX = (width - 2 * padX) / (cols - 1);
  const gapY = (height - 2 * padY) / (Math.ceil(sectors.length / cols) - 1);
  const sectorCenter = {};
  sectors.forEach((s, i) => {
    const col = i % cols;
    const row = Math.floor(i / cols);
    sectorCenter[s] = {
      x: padX + col * gapX,
      y: padY + row * gapY
    };
  });

  // ── Force simulation ─────────────────────────────────────
  const nodes = data.map(d => ({ ...d }));

  const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
    .force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorCenter[d.sector].x).strength(0.4))
    .force("y", d3.forceY(d => sectorCenter[d.sector].y).strength(0.4))
    .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radius(d) + 2).strength(0.9))
    .stop();

  // Run simulation synchronously for stable layout
  for (let i = 0; i < 300; i++) simulation.tick();

  // ── Tooltip ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  const tooltip = d3.select("body").append("div").attr("class", "tooltip");

  // ── Draw bubbles ─────────────────────────────────────────
  const bubbleGroup = svg.append("g");

  const circles = bubbleGroup.selectAll("circle")
    .data(nodes)
    .join("circle")
    .attr("cx", d => d.x)
    .attr("cy", d => d.y)
    .attr("r", d => radius(d))
    .attr("fill", d => colorScale(d.sector))
    .attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker)
    .on("mouseover", (event, d) => {
      if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
      tooltip.transition().duration(150).style("opacity", 0.95);
      tooltip.html(
        `<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>Sector: ${d.sector}`
      )
        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
        .style("top", (event.pageY - 30) + "px");
    })
    .on("mousemove", (event, d) => {
      if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
      tooltip
        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
        .style("top", (event.pageY - 30) + "px");
    })
    .on("mouseout", () => {
      tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0);
    })
    .on("click", (event, d) => {
      selectStock(d.ticker);
    });

  // ── Labels inside bubbles ────────────────────────────────
  bubbleGroup.selectAll("text.bubble-label")
    .data(nodes)
    .join("text")
    .attr("class", "bubble-label")
    .attr("x", d => d.x)
    .attr("y", d => d.y)
    .style("font-size", d => Math.max(7, radius(d) / 2.8) + "px")
    .text(d => d.ticker);

  // ── Legend ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  const legendG = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width - 170}, 14)`);

  sectors.forEach((s, i) => {
    const g = legendG.append("g")
      .attr("class", "legend-item")
      .attr("transform", `translate(0, ${i * 22})`);
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("width", 14).attr("height", 14)
      .attr("rx", 3)
      .attr("fill", colorScale(s));
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", 20).attr("y", 11)
      .text(s);
  });

  // ── Data table ──────────────────────────────────────────
  const table = d3.select("#data-table").append("table");
  const thead = table.append("thead").append("tr");
  ["Ticker symbol", "Full company name", "Sector", "Market cap"].forEach(col => {
    thead.append("th").text(col);
  });

  const tbody = table.append("tbody");
  const rows = tbody.selectAll("tr")
    .data(data)
    .join("tr")
    .attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker)
    .on("click", (event, d) => {
      selectStock(d.ticker);
    });

  rows.each(function (d) {
    const tr = d3.select(this);
    tr.append("td").text(d.ticker);
    tr.append("td").text(d.name);
    tr.append("td").text(d.sector);
    tr.append("td").text(formatMarketCap(d.marketCap));
  });

  // ── Bidirectional selection ──────────────────────────────
  function selectStock(ticker) {
    // Clear previous
    d3.selectAll("circle").classed("selected", false);
    d3.selectAll("tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);

    // Highlight bubble
    d3.select(`circle[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`).classed("selected", true);

    // Highlight row & scroll into view
    const row = d3.select(`tr[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`);
    row.classed("highlighted", true);
    if (row.node()) {
      row.node().scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
    }
  }
})();
JSEOF
echo "Done: visualization.js"'","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

    .on("mouseover", (event, d) => {

      tooltip.transition().duration(150).style("opacity", 0.95);
      tooltip.html(
        `<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>Sector: ${d.sector}`
      )
        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
        .style("top", (event.pageY - 30) + "px");
    })
    .on("mousemove", (event, d) => {
      if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
      tooltip
        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
        .style("top", (event.pageY - 30) + "px");
    })
    .on("mouseout", () => {
      tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0);
    })
    .on("click", (event, d) => {
      selectStock(d.ticker);
    });

  // ── Labels inside bubbles ────────────────────────────────
  bubbleGroup.selectAll("text.bubble-label")
    .data(nodes)
    .join("text")
    .attr("class", "bubble-label")
    .attr("x", d => d.x)
    .attr("y", d => d.y)
    .style("font-size", d => Math.max(7, radius(d) / 2.8) + "px")
    .text(d => d.ticker);

  // ── Legend ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  const legendG = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width - 170}, 14)`);

  sectors.forEach((s, i) => {
    const g = legendG.append("g")
      .attr("class", "legend-item")
      .attr("transform", `translate(0, ${i * 22})`);
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("width", 14).attr("height", 14)
      .attr("rx", 3)
      .attr("fill", colorScale(s));
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", 20).attr("y", 11)
      .text(s);
  });

  // ── Data table ──────────────────────────────────────────
  const table = d3.select("#data-table").append("table");
  const thead = table.append("thead").append("tr");
  ["Ticker symbol", "Full company name", "Sector", "Market cap"].forEach(col => {
    thead.append("th").text(col);
  });

  const tbody = table.append("tbody");
  const rows = tbody.selectAll("tr")
    .data(data)
    .join("tr")
    .attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker)
    .on("click", (event, d) => {
      selectStock(d.ticker);
    });

  rows.each(function (d) {
    const tr = d3.select(this);
    tr.append("td").text(d.ticker);
    tr.append("td").text(d.name);
    tr.append("td").text(d.sector);
    tr.append("td").text(formatMarketCap(d.marketCap));
  });

  // ── Bidirectional selection ──────────────────────────────
  function selectStock(ticker) {
    // Clear previous
    d3.selectAll("circle").classed("selected", false);
    d3.selectAll("tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);

    // Highlight bubble
    d3.select(`circle[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`).classed("selected", true);

    // Highlight row & scroll into view
    const row = d3.select(`tr[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`);
    row.classed("highlighted", true);
    if (row.node()) {
      row.node().scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
    }
  }
})();

"""
Tests for data-to-d3 task - validates requirements using Playwright browser testing

Test philosophy:

  * ETF tooltips exclusion
  * Spatial sector clustering
  * Legend completeness with all 5 sectors
  * Ticker labels on bubbles
- During test execution, a full-page screenshot of the rendered visualization
  is saved to /logs/verifier/visualization.png (copied to host in job output)
- This allows reviewers to visually inspect the agent's output and debug issues
  without needing to manually run the visualization

# D3.js Force Simulation Bubble Chart

## Overview
D3 force simulation positions elements using physics-based forces. Ideal for bubble charts where items cluster by category.

## Key Forces
- "'`d3.forceSimulation(nodes)` — creates simulation
- `d3.forceX(x).strength(s)` — pulls nodes toward x position (use for sector clustering)
- `d3.forceY(y).strength(s)` — pulls nodes toward y position
- `d3.forceCollide(radius).strength(1)` — prevents overlap; radius should be slightly larger than bubble radius
- `d3.forceManyBody().strength(n)` — repulsion (negative) or attraction (positive)

## Sector Clustering Pattern
```javascript
// Assign each sector a target x,y position
const sectorCenters = { "Tech": {x: 200, y: 200}, "Finance": {x: 400, y: 200} };

const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorCenters[d.sector].x).strength(0.3))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(d => sectorCenters[d.sector].y).strength(0.3))
  .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radiusScale(d.value) + 1).strength(1))
  .on("tick", ticked);
```

## Bubble Sizing
- Use `d3.scaleSqrt()` for area-proportional sizing (not linear)
- Domain: [min marketCap, max marketCap]
- Range: [minRadius, maxRadius] e.g. [8, 50]

## Labels Inside Bubbles
```javascript
// Add text elements at same position as circles
nodeGroup.append("text")
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("dominant-baseline", "central")
  .attr("font-size", d => Math.max(8, radius(d) * 0.4))
  .text(d => d.ticker);
```

## Tooltip Pattern
```javascript
const tooltip = d3.select("body").append("div")
  .attr("class", "tooltip")
  .style("opacity", 0)
  .style("position", "absolute");

circles.on("mouseover", (event, d) => {
    tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0.9);
    tooltip.html(`<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>${d.sector}`)
      .style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
      .style("top", (event.pageY - 28) + "px");
  })
  .on("mouseout", () => tooltip.transition().duration(500).style("opacity", 0));
```

## Legend
```javascript
const legend = svg.selectAll(".legend")
  .data(sectors)
  .enter().append("g")
  .attr("class", "legend")
  .attr("transform", (d, i) => `translate(0, ${i * 20})`);

legend.append("rect").attr("width", 14).attr("height", 14).style("fill", colorScale);
legend.append("text").attr("x", 20).attr("y", 12).text(d => d);
```
SKILL_EOF

# D3.js Data Table with Interactions

## Overview
Building interactive HTML tables with D3 that sync with chart elements.

## Table Construction
"'```javascript
const table = d3.select("#table-container").append("table");
const thead = table.append("thead");
const tbody = table.append("tbody");

// Header row
thead.append("tr").selectAll("th")
  .data(columns)
  .enter().append("th")
  .text(d => d.label);

// Data rows
const rows = tbody.selectAll("tr")
  .data(data)
  .enter().append("tr")
  .attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker);

// Cells
rows.selectAll("td")
  .data(d => columns.map(col => ({ value: d[col.key], format: col.format })))
  .enter().append("td")
  .text(d => d.format ? d.format(d.value) : d.value);
```

## Market Cap Formatting
```javascript
function formatMarketCap(value) {
  if (!value || isNaN(value)) return "N/A";
  if (value >= 1e12) return (value / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
  if (value >= 1e9) return (value / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
  if (value >= 1e6) return (value / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
  return value.toFixed(2);
}
```

## Bidirectional Click Selection
```javascript
// Click bubble → highlight table row
circles.on("click", (event, d) => {
  const ticker = d.ticker;
  d3.selectAll("table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.select(`table tbody tr[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`).classed("highlighted", true);
  // Scroll into view
  document.querySelector(`tr[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`)?.scrollIntoView({behavior: "smooth", block: "center"});
});

// Click table row → highlight bubble
rows.on("click", function(event, d) {
  const ticker = d.ticker;
  d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.select(`circle[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`).classed("highlighted", true);
});
```

  if (value >= 1e9) return (value / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
  if (value >= 1e6) return (value / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
  return value.toFixed(2);
}
```

## Bidirectional Click Selection
```javascript
// Click bubble → highlight table row
circles.on("click", (event, d) => {
  const ticker = d.ticker;
  d3.selectAll("table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.select(`table tbody tr[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`).classed("highlighted", true);
  // Scroll into view
  document.querySelector(`tr[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`)?.scrollIntoView({behavior: "smooth", block: "center"});
});

// Click table row → highlight bubble
rows.on("click", function(event, d) {
  const ticker = d.ticker;
  d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.select(`circle[data-ticker="${ticker}"]`).classed("highlighted", true);
});
```

# Playwright Testing for D3 Visualizations

## Common Test Selectors
- Bubbles: "'`svg circle`

## Key Test Patterns

3. **Bubble attributes**: Each circle should have `data-ticker`, fill color, radius > 0
4. **Labels**: Text elements inside SVG matching ticker symbols
5. **Tooltip behavior**: Hover over circle → tooltip becomes visible with correct content
6. **ETF tooltip exclusion**: Hover over ETF bubble → no tooltip (or empty)
7. **Legend**: Should show all 5 sectors with colored indicators
8. **Market cap formatting**: Table cells should show "T", "B", "M" suffixes
9. **Bidirectional selection**: Click bubble → table row highlighted; click row → bubble highlighted
10. **Sector clustering**: Bubbles of same sector should be spatially close

## Spatial Clustering Test
```python
# Get positions of all circles, group by sector
# Calculate centroid per sector
# Verify intra-sector distance < inter-sector distance
```

## Important DOM Attributes for Tests
- `data-ticker` on circles and table rows
- `data-sector` on circles for sector identification
- Class names: `highlighted`, `tooltip`, `legend`

    color: #333;
    padding: 20px;

    margin-bottom: 16px;
    font-size: 24px;

    font-size: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    color: #444;
}

.container {
    display: flex;
    gap: 24px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    align-items: flex-start;
}

.chart-container {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.chart-container svg {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
}

.table-container {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    max-height: 650px;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 13px;
}

thead {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 2;
}

thead th {
    background: #1a1a2e;
    color: #fff;
    padding: 10px 8px;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: default;
}

tbody tr {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s;
}

tbody tr:hover {
    background: #f0f4ff;
}

tbody tr.highlighted {
    background: #fff3cd "'!important;
    outline: 2px solid #ffc107;
}

tbody td {
    padding: 8px;
}

.tooltip {
    position: absolute;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);

    border-radius: 6px;
    pointer-events: none;
    font-size: 13px;

    opacity: 0;

    max-width: 280px;
}

.bubble-label {
    pointer-events: none;
    text-anchor: middle;
    dominant-baseline: central;

}

circle.highlighted {
    stroke: #333;
    stroke-width: 3px;
}

circle:hover {
    stroke-width: 2.5px;
}

.legend text {
    font-size: 12px;
    fill: #333;
}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_27","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/output/js/visualization.js << 'JSEOF'
(function() {
    \"use strict\";

    const width = 660;
    const height = 600;
    const ETF_RADIUS = 14;

    // Sector color scheme
    const sectorColors = {
        \"Information Technology\": \"#4e79a7\",
        \"Financial\": \"#f28e2b\",
        \"Energy\": \"#e15759\",
        \"Industry\": \"#76b7b2\",
        \"ETF\": \"#af7aa1\"
    };

    const sectorList = [\"Information Technology\", \"Financial\", \"Energy\", \"Industry\", \"ETF\"];

    // Sector cluster centers (arranged in a nice layout)
    const sectorCenters = {
        \"Information Technology\": { x: width * 0.25, y: height * 0.3 },
        \"Financial\":             { x: width * 0.75, y: height * 0.3 },
        \"Energy\":                { x: width * 0.25, y: height * 0.7 },
        \"Industry\":              { x: width * 0.75, y: height * 0.7 },
        \"ETF\":                   { x: width * 0.5,  y: height * 0.5 }
    };

    function formatMarketCap(value) {
        if ("'!value || isNaN(value)) return "N/A";
        var v = +value;
        if (v >= 1e12) return (v / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
        if (v >= 1e9) return (v / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
        if (v >= 1e6) return (v / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
        return v.toFixed(2);
    }

    // Load data
    d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d["full name"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null,
                isETF: d.sector === "ETF"
            };
        });

        // Radius scale for market cap
        var marketCaps = data.filter(function(d) { return d.marketCap && !isNaN(d.marketCap); }).map(function(d) { return d.marketCap; });
        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([d3.min(marketCaps), d3.max(marketCaps)])
            .range([10, 50]);

        function getRadius(d) {
            if (d.isETF) return ETF_RADIUS;
            return d.marketCap ? radiusScale(d.marketCap) : 12;
        }

        // Color scale
        var colorScale = function(sector) {
            return sectorColors[sector] || "#999";
        };

        // ========== BUBBLE CHART ==========
        var svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")
            .append("svg")
            .attr("width", width)
            .attr("height", height)
            .attr("viewBox", "0 0 " + width + " " + height);

        var tooltip = d3.select("#tooltip");

        // Initialize positions near sector centers
        data.forEach(function(d) {
            d.x = sectorCenters[d.sector].x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
            d.y = sectorCenters[d.sector].y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
        });

        // Create node groups
        var nodeGroup = svg.selectAll(".node")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("g")
            .attr("class", "node");

        // Circles
        var circles = nodeGroup.append("circle")
            .attr("r", function(d) { return getRadius(d); })
            .attr("fill", function(d) { return colorScale(d.sector); })
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; });

        // Labels
        nodeGroup.append("text")
            .attr("class", "bubble-label")
            .attr("font-size", function(d) { return Math.max(7, getRadius(d) * 0.38) + "px"; })
            .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; });

        // Force simulation
        var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
            .force("x", d3.forceX(function(d) { return sectorCenters[d.sector].x; }).strength(0.4))
            .force("y", d3.forceY(function(d) { return sectorCenters[d.sector].y; }).strength(0.4))
            .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(function(d) { return getRadius(d) + 2; }).strength(1).iterations(3))
            .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-5))
            .on("tick", function() {
                nodeGroup.attr("transform", function(d) {
                    d.x = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(width - getRadius(d), d.x));
                    d.y = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(height - getRadius(d), d.y));
                    return "translate(" + d.x + "," + d.y + ")";
                });
            });

        // Run simulation synchronously for stable layout
        simulation.alpha(1).restart();
        for (var i = 0; i < 300; i++) simulation.tick();
        simulation.stop();
        // Apply final positions
        nodeGroup.attr("transform", function(d) {
            d.x = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(width - getRadius(d), d.x));
            d.y = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(height - getRadius(d), d.y));
            return "translate(" + d.x + "," + d.y + ")";
        });

        // Tooltip events (only for non-ETF)
        circles
            .on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
                if (d.isETF) return;
                tooltip.style("opacity", "0.95")
                    .html("<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" + d.name + "<br>Sector: " + d.sector);
                tooltip.style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
                    .style("top", (event.pageY - 30) + "px");
            })
            .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
                if (d.isETF) return;
                tooltip.style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
                    .style("top", (event.pageY - 30) + "px");
            })
            .on("mouseout", function() {
                tooltip.style("opacity", "0");
            });

        // Legend
        var legendGroup = svg.append("g")
            .attr("class", "legend-group")
            .attr("transform", "translate(10, 10)");

        sectorList.forEach(function(sector, i) {
            var g = legendGroup.append("g")
                .attr("class", "legend")
                .attr("transform", "translate(0," + (i * 22) + ")");
            g.append("rect")
                .attr("width", 14)
                .attr("height", 14)
                .attr("rx", 3)
                .style("fill", colorScale(sector));
            g.append("text")
                .attr("x", 20)
                .attr("y", 12)
                .text(sector);
        });

        // ========== DATA TABLE ==========
        var table = d3.select("#stock-table").append("table");
        var thead = table.append("thead");
        var tbody = table.append("tbody");

        var columns = [
            { label: "Ticker", key: "ticker" },
            { label: "Company Name", key: "name" },
            { label: "Sector", key: "sector" },
            { label: "Market Cap", key: "marketCap", format: formatMarketCap }
        ];

        // Header
        thead.append("tr").selectAll("th")
            .data(columns)
            .enter()
            .append("th")
            .text(function(c) { return c.label; });

        // Rows
        var rows = tbody.selectAll("tr")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("tr")
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; });

        // Cells
        rows.selectAll("td")
            .data(function(d) {
                return columns.map(function(c) {
                    var val = d[c.key];
                    return c.format ? c.format(val) : (val || "N/A");
                });
            })
            .enter()
            .append("td")
            .text(function(d) { return d; });

        // ========== BIDIRECTIONAL CLICK ==========
        var selectedTicker = null;

        function selectStock(ticker) {
            // Deselect if same ticker clicked again
            if (selectedTicker === ticker) {
                selectedTicker = null;
                d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
                d3.selectAll("tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
                return;
            }
            selectedTicker = ticker;

            // Highlight circle
            d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
            d3.selectAll("circle[data-ticker='"'\" + ticker + \"']\").classed(\"highlighted\", true);

            // Highlight table row
            d3.selectAll(\"tbody tr\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
            d3.selectAll(\"tbody tr[data-ticker='\" + ticker + \"']\").classed(\"highlighted\", true);

            // Scroll table row into view
            var row = document.querySelector(\"tbody tr[data-ticker='\" + ticker + \"']\");
            if (row) {
                row.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\", block: \"center\" });
            }
        }

        // Click on bubble
        circles.on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
            selectStock(d.ticker);
        });

        // Click on table row
        rows.on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
            selectStock(d.ticker);
        });

    }).catch(function(error) {
        console.error(\"Error loading data:\", error);
    });
})();

(function() {

    const height = 600;
    const ETF_RADIUS = 14;

    // Sector color scheme
    const sectorColors = {
        \"Information Technology\": \"#4e79a7\",
        \"Financial\": \"#f28e2b\",
        \"Energy\": \"#e15759\",
        \"Industry\": \"#76b7b2\",
        \"ETF\": \"#af7aa1\"
    };

    const sectorCenters = {
        \"Information Technology\": { x: width * 0.25, y: height * 0.3 },
        \"Financial\":             { x: width * 0.75, y: height * 0.3 },
        \"Energy\":                { x: width * 0.25, y: height * 0.7 },
        \"Industry\":              { x: width * 0.75, y: height * 0.7 },
        \"ETF\":                   { x: width * 0.5,  y: height * 0.5 }
    };

    function formatMarketCap(value) {
        if ("'!value || isNaN(value)) return "N/A";
        var v = +value;
        if (v >= 1e12) return (v / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
        if (v >= 1e9) return (v / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
        if (v >= 1e6) return (v / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
        return v.toFixed(2);
    }

    // Load data
    d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d["full name"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null,
                isETF: d.sector === "ETF"
            };
        });

        // Radius scale for market cap
        var marketCaps = data.filter(function(d) { return d.marketCap && !isNaN(d.marketCap); }).map(function(d) { return d.marketCap; });
        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([d3.min(marketCaps), d3.max(marketCaps)])
            .range([10, 50]);

        function getRadius(d) {
            if (d.isETF) return ETF_RADIUS;
            return d.marketCap ? radiusScale(d.marketCap) : 12;
        }

        // Color scale
        var colorScale = function(sector) {
            return sectorColors[sector] || "#999";
        };

        // ========== BUBBLE CHART ==========
        var svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")

                const transform = g.getAttribute('transform');
                const match = transform.match(/translate\\\\(([\\\\d.]+),([\\\\d.]+)\\\\)/);
                if (match) {
                    const sector = c.getAttribute('data-sector');
                    if ("'!sectors[sector]) sectors[sector] = [];
                    sectors[sector].push({x: +match[1], y: +match[2]});
                }
            });
            // Calculate centroids
            const centroids = {};
            for (const [s, pts] of Object.entries(sectors)) {
                centroids[s] = {
                    x: pts.reduce((a,b) => a+b.x, 0) / pts.length,
                    y: pts.reduce((a,b) => a+b.y, 0) / pts.length,
                    count: pts.length
                };
            }
            return centroids;
        })()
    """)
    print(f"'"\\nSector centroids: {cluster_data}\")
    
    if errors:
        print(f\"\\nPage errors: {errors}\")
    if console_msgs:
        print(f\"\\nConsole: {console_msgs}\")
    
    browser.close()
httpd.shutdown()

            const sectors = {};
            circles.forEach(c => {
                const g = c.parentElement;
                const transform = g.getAttribute('transform');
                const match = transform.match(/translate\\\\(([\\\\d.]+),([\\\\d.]+)\\\\)/);
                if (match) {
                    const sector = c.getAttribute('data-sector');
                    if ("'!sectors[sector]) sectors[sector] = [];
                    sectors[sector].push({x: +match[1], y: +match[2]});
                }
            });
            // Calculate centroids
            const centroids = {};
            for (const [s, pts] of Object.entries(sectors)) {
                centroids[s] = {
                    x: pts.reduce((a,b) => a+b.x, 0) / pts.length,
                    y: pts.reduce((a,b) => a+b.y, 0) / pts.length,
                    count: pts.length
                };
            }
            return centroids;
        })()
    """)
    print(f"'"\\nSector centroids: {cluster_data}\")

    browser.close()

                if (match) {
                    const sector = c.getAttribute('data-sector');
                    if ("'!sectors[sector]) sectors[sector] = [];
                    sectors[sector].push({x: +match[1], y: +match[2]});
                }
            });
            // Calculate centroids
            const centroids = {};
            for (const [s, pts] of Object.entries(sectors)) {
                centroids[s] = {
                    x: pts.reduce((a,b) => a+b.x, 0) / pts.length,
                    y: pts.reduce((a,b) => a+b.y, 0) / pts.length,
                    count: pts.length
                };
            }
            return centroids;
        })()
    """)
    print(f"'"\\nSector centroids: {cluster_data}\")
    
    if errors:
        print(f\"\\nPage errors: {errors}\")
    if console_msgs:
        print(f\"\\nConsole: {console_msgs}\")
    
    browser.close()
httpd.shutdown()

Use `forceX` and `forceY` with a strength (0.2–0.5) to pull bubbles toward their sector centroid. This groups same-sector bubbles together. ```js const sectors = ["ETF", "Energy", "Financial", "Industry", "Information Technology"]; const sectorCentroids = {}; sectors.forEach((s, i) => { const angle = (2 * Math.PI * i) / sectors.length; const radius = 120; sectorCentroids[s] = { x: width / 2 + radius * Math.cos(angle), y: height / 2 + radius * Math.sin(angle) }; }); ``` ### Bubble Sizing by Market Cap ```js const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt() .domain([0, d3.max(data, d => d.marketCap)]) .range([4, 40]); ``` ### Color by Sector ```js const color = d3.scaleOrdinal() .domain(sectors) .range(d3.schemeTableau10.slice(0, sectors.length)); ``` ### Tooltip Pattern ```html
``` Show on mouseover (set opacity to 1), hide on mouseout (set opacity to 0). For ETFs, do NOT show tooltip (keep opacity 0). ### Data Attributes on Elements Always add `data-ticker` and `data-sector` attributes on circles and table rows for testability: ```js circle.attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker) .attr("data-sector", d => d.sector); ``` ### Legend Pattern Use individual `.legend-item` elements with a colored rect and text label: ```js const legendItems = legend.selectAll(".legend-item") .data(sectors).enter() .append("g").attr("class", "legend-item"); legendItems.append("rect").attr("width", 12).attr("height", 12).attr("fill", d => color(d)); legendItems.append("text").text(d => d); ``` ## Tips - Use `forceCollide` with radius + padding to prevent overlap - Keep force strengths moderate (0.2–0.5) for good clustering without jitter - Run simulation for ~300 ticks with `simulation.alpha(1).restart()` SKILL_EOF echo "Skill 1 created"'","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}} {"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_14","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/environment/skills/d3-force-bubble-chart.md << 'SKILL_EOF' # D3.js v6 Force-Simulation Bubble Chart ## Overview Create bubble charts using D3 v6 force simulation to cluster circles by category, size by a numeric field, and color by category. ## Key APIs ### Force Simulation "'```js const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes) .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(5)) .force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorX(d.sector)).strength(0.3)) .force("y", d3.forceY(d => sectorY(d.sector)).strength(0.3)) .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => d.radius + 1.5)) .on("tick", ticked); ``` ### Sector Clustering with forceX/forceY Assign each sector a target (x, y) position. def browser_page():

        yield page
        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

def test_file_structure():
    assert os.path.exists(f\"{OUTPUT_DIR}/index.html\")
    assert os.path.exists(f\"{OUTPUT_DIR}/js/d3.v6.min.js\")
    assert os.path.exists(f\"{OUTPUT_DIR}/js/visualization.js\")
    assert os.path.exists(f\"{OUTPUT_DIR}/css/style.css\")
    assert os.path.exists(f\"{OUTPUT_DIR}/data/stock-descriptions.csv\")
    assert os.path.isdir(f\"{OUTPUT_DIR}/data/indiv-stock\")

def test_bubbles_render(browser_page):
    count = browser_page.locator(\"svg circle\").count()
    assert count == 50, f\"Expected 50 circles, got {count}\"
    # Check data-ticker and data-sector attributes
    first = browser_page.locator(\"svg circle\").first
    assert first.get_attribute(\"data-ticker\"), \"Missing data-ticker\"
    assert first.get_attribute(\"data-sector\"), \"Missing data-sector\"

def test_table_render(browser_page):
    rows = browser_page.locator(\"table tbody tr\")
    count = rows.count()
    assert count == 50, f\"Expected 50 rows, got {count}\"
    # Check headers
    headers = browser_page.locator(\"table thead th\").all_text_contents()
    assert len(headers) == 4, f\"Expected 4 headers, got {headers}\"

def test_tooltip_non_etf(browser_page):
    page = browser_page
    # Find a non-ETF circle
    aapl = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
    aapl.hover()
    page.wait_for_timeout(500)
    tooltip = page.locator(\"#tooltip\")
    opacity = tooltip.evaluate(\"el => getComputedStyle(el).opacity\")
    print(f\"Non-ETF tooltip opacity: {opacity}\")
    assert float(opacity) > 0.5, f\"Tooltip should be visible for non-ETF, opacity={opacity}\"
    content = tooltip.text_content()
    print(f\"Tooltip content: {content}\")
    assert \"AAPL\" in content, f\"Tooltip should contain ticker\"

def test_tooltip_etf_hidden(browser_page):
    page = browser_page
    # First hover a non-ETF to show tooltip
    aapl = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
    aapl.hover()
    page.wait_for_timeout(300)
    # Now hover an ETF
    spy = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
    spy.hover()
    page.wait_for_timeout(500)
    tooltip = page.locator(\"#tooltip\")
    opacity = tooltip.evaluate(\"el => getComputedStyle(el).opacity\")
    print(f\"ETF tooltip opacity: {opacity}\")
    assert float(opacity) < 0.5, f\"Tooltip should be hidden for ETF, opacity={opacity}\"

def test_legend_completeness(browser_page):
    items = browser_page.locator(\".legend-item\")
    count = items.count()
    print(f\"Legend items: {count}\")
    assert count == 5, f\"Expected 5 legend items, got {count}\"
    texts = items.all_text_contents()
    print(f\"Legend texts: {texts}\")
    for sector in [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]:
        assert any(sector in t for t in texts), f\"Missing legend for {sector}\"

    page = browser_page
    # Click a bubble
    msft = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
    msft.click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(300)
    row = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
    cls = row.get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\"
    assert \"highlighted\" in cls, f\"Row should be highlighted, class={cls}\"

def test_market_cap_format(browser_page):

    # Check AMZN row has T suffix

    text = amzn_row.text_content()
    print(f\"AMZN row: {text}\")
    assert \"T\" in text, f\"AMZN market cap should have T suffix\"

import os, http.server, socketserver, threading
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

OUTPUT_DIR = \"/root/output\"

@pytest.fixture(scope=\"module\")
def browser_page():
    PORT = 8766
    os.chdir(OUTPUT_DIR)
    httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler)
    t = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
    t.start()
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page()
        page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=30000)
        page.wait_for_selector(\"svg circle\", timeout=10000)
        yield page
        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

def test_sector_clustering(browser_page):
    \"\"\"Verify bubbles of same sector are spatially clustered.\"\"\"
    page = browser_page
    sectors = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]
    for sector in sectors:
        circles = page.locator(f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]')
        count = circles.count()
        assert count > 0, f\"No circles for sector {sector}\"
        positions = []
        for i in range(count):
            c = circles.nth(i)
            cx = float(c.get_attribute(\"cx\"))
            cy = float(c.get_attribute(\"cy\"))
            positions.append((cx, cy))
        # Calculate centroid
        avg_x = sum(p[0] for p in positions) / len(positions)
        avg_y = sum(p[1] for p in positions) / len(positions)
        # Check all circles are within reasonable distance of centroid
        for px, py in positions:
            dist = ((px - avg_x)**2 + (py - avg_y)**2)**0.5
            assert dist < 200, f\"Circle in {sector} too far from centroid: dist={dist:.1f}\"
        print(f\"{sector}: {count} circles, centroid=({avg_x:.0f},{avg_y:.0f})\")

def test_data_integrity(browser_page):
    \"\"\"Verify all 50 tickers are present in both chart and table.\"\"\"
    page = browser_page
    circle_tickers = set()
    circles = page.locator(\"svg circle\")
    for i in range(circles.count()):
        t = circles.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-ticker\")
        circle_tickers.add(t)
    
    row_tickers = set()
    rows = page.locator(\"table tbody tr\")
    for i in range(rows.count()):
        t = rows.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-ticker\")
        row_tickers.add(t)
    
    assert len(circle_tickers) == 50, f\"Expected 50 unique circle tickers, got {len(circle_tickers)}\"
    assert len(row_tickers) == 50, f\"Expected 50 unique row tickers, got {len(row_tickers)}\"
    assert circle_tickers == row_tickers, \"Circle and row tickers don't match\"

def test_bubble_labels(browser_page):
    \"\"\"Verify ticker labels on bubbles.\"\"\"
    page = browser_page
    labels = page.locator(\"svg .bubble-label\")
    count = labels.count()
    assert count == 50, f\"Expected 50 bubble labels, got {count}\"
    # Check a specific label
    texts = set()
    for i in range(count):
        texts.add(labels.nth(i).text_content())
    assert \"AAPL\" in texts, \"Missing AAPL label\"
    assert \"MSFT\" in texts, \"Missing MSFT label\"

def test_click_row_highlights_bubble(browser_page):
    \"\"\"Click table row, verify bubble gets highlighted.\"\"\"
    page = browser_page
    row = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"NVDA\"]')
    row.click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(300)
    circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"NVDA\"]')
    cls = circle.get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\"
    assert \"highlighted\" in cls, f\"Circle should be highlighted, class={cls}\"

import os, http.server, socketserver, threading
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

def browser_page():
    PORT = 8766
    os.chdir(OUTPUT_DIR)

        page.wait_for_selector(\"svg circle\", timeout=10000)
        yield page
        browser.close()

def test_sector_clustering(browser_page):
    \"\"\"Verify bubbles of same sector are spatially clustered.\"\"\"
    page = browser_page
    sectors = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]
    for sector in sectors:
        circles = page.locator(f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]')
        count = circles.count()
        assert count > 0, f\"No circles for sector {sector}\"
        positions = []
        for i in range(count):
            c = circles.nth(i)
            cx = float(c.get_attribute(\"cx\"))
            cy = float(c.get_attribute(\"cy\"))
            positions.append((cx, cy))
        # Calculate centroid
        avg_x = sum(p[0] for p in positions) / len(positions)
        avg_y = sum(p[1] for p in positions) / len(positions)
        # Check all circles are within reasonable distance of centroid
        for px, py in positions:
            dist = ((px - avg_x)**2 + (py - avg_y)**2)**0.5
            assert dist < 200, f\"Circle in {sector} too far from centroid: dist={dist:.1f}\"
        print(f\"{sector}: {count} circles, centroid=({avg_x:.0f},{avg_y:.0f})\")

def test_data_integrity(browser_page):
    \"\"\"Verify all 50 tickers are present in both chart and table.\"\"\"
    page = browser_page
    circle_tickers = set()
    circles = page.locator(\"svg circle\")
    for i in range(circles.count()):
        t = circles.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-ticker\")
        circle_tickers.add(t)
    
    row_tickers = set()
    rows = page.locator(\"table tbody tr\")
    for i in range(rows.count()):
        t = rows.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-ticker\")
        row_tickers.add(t)
    
    assert len(circle_tickers) == 50, f\"Expected 50 unique circle tickers, got {len(circle_tickers)}\"
    assert len(row_tickers) == 50, f\"Expected 50 unique row tickers, got {len(row_tickers)}\"
    assert circle_tickers == row_tickers, \"Circle and row tickers don't match\"

# D3.js Tooltip and Legend Patterns

## Tooltip with Opacity Control
The tooltip must use CSS "'`opacity` for show/hide (not display or visibility).

```html
<div id="tooltip" style="opacity: 0; position: absolute; ..."></div>
```

```javascript
// Show tooltip (non-ETF only)
circle.on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
  if (d.sector === "ETF") return; // Don'"'t show for ETFs
  d3.select(\"#tooltip\")
    .style(\"opacity\", \"1\")
    .html("'`<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>Sector: ${d.sector}`)
    .style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
    .style("top", (event.pageY - 10) + "px");
})
.on("mousemove", function(event) {
  d3.select("#tooltip")
    .style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
    .style("top", (event.pageY - 10) + "px");
})
.on("mouseout", function() {
  d3.select("#tooltip").style("opacity", "0");
});
```

### Key: ETF hover must keep opacity < 0.5, non-ETF hover must set opacity > 0.5

## Legend with .legend-item Class
```javascript
const legend = svg.selectAll(".legend-item")
  .data(sectors)
  .join("g")
  .attr("class", "legend-item");

legend.append("rect").attr("fill", d => colorScale(d));
legend.append("text").text(d => d);
```

### Key: Exactly 5 legend items for sectors: Energy, ETF, Financial, Industry, Information Technology

# D3.js v6 Force-Simulation Bubble Chart

## Overview
Create bubble charts using D3 v6 force simulation to cluster bubbles by category.

## Key Patterns

### Force Simulation Setup
"'```javascript
const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
  .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(5))
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorX(d.sector)).strength(0.3))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(d => sectorY(d.sector)).strength(0.3))
  .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radiusScale(d.value) + 1.5))
  .on("tick", ticked);
```

### Bubble Sizing by Value
```javascript
const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
  .domain([0, d3.max(data, d => d.value)])
  .range([minRadius, maxRadius]);
```

### Sector Clustering with forceX/forceY
- Assign each sector a target (x, y) position
- Use forceX and forceY with moderate strength (0.2-0.4) to pull bubbles toward sector centers
- Use forceCollide to prevent overlap

### Color by Category
```javascript
const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
  .domain(sectors)
  .range(d3.schemeTableau10);
```

### Tooltip Pattern
```javascript
const tooltip = d3.select("#tooltip");
circle.on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
  tooltip.style("opacity", 1)
    .html(`<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>${d.sector}`);
})
.on("mouseout", function() {
  tooltip.style("opacity", 0);
});
```

### Labels Inside Bubbles
```javascript

### Force Simulation Setup
"'```javascript

}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_30","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/output/js/visualization.js << 'JSEOF'
(function() {
    const width = 700;
    const height = 600;
    const legendHeight = 80;
    const totalHeight = height + legendHeight;

    const svg = d3.select(\"#bubble-chart\")
        .attr(\"width\", width)
        .attr(\"height\", totalHeight);

    const chartGroup = svg.append(\"g\");

    const tooltip = d3.select(\"#tooltip\");

    const sectors = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"];

    const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain(sectors)
        .range([\"#e15759\", \"#76b7b2\", \"#4e79a7\", \"#f28e2b\", \"#59a14f\"]);

    const sectorPositions = {
        \"Energy\":                 { x: width * 0.2,  y: height * 0.3 },
        \"ETF\":                    { x: width * 0.5,  y: height * 0.7 },
        \"Financial\":              { x: width * 0.8,  y: height * 0.3 },
        \"Industry\":               { x: width * 0.2,  y: height * 0.7 },
        \"Information Technology\":  { x: width * 0.65, y: height * 0.5 }
    };

    function formatMarketCap(val) {
        if ("'!val || isNaN(val) || val === "") return "N/A";
        var num = +val;
        if (isNaN(num)) return "N/A";
        if (num >= 1e12) return (num / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
        if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
        if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
        return num.toString();
    }

    d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d["full name"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null
            };
        });

        var nonEtfCaps = data.filter(function(d) { return d.marketCap && d.marketCap > 0; }).map(function(d) { return d.marketCap; });
        var maxCap = d3.max(nonEtfCaps);
        var minCap = d3.min(nonEtfCaps);

        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([minCap, maxCap])
            .range([12, 45]);

        var etfRadius = 14;

        function getRadius(d) {
            if (d.sector === "ETF" || !d.marketCap) return etfRadius;
            return radiusScale(d.marketCap);
        }

        data.forEach(function(d) {
            d.radius = getRadius(d);
            d.x = sectorPositions[d.sector] ? sectorPositions[d.sector].x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50 : width / 2;
            d.y = sectorPositions[d.sector] ? sectorPositions[d.sector].y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50 : height / 2;
        });

        var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
            .force("x", d3.forceX(function(d) { return sectorPositions[d.sector].x; }).strength(0.3))
            .force("y", d3.forceY(function(d) { return sectorPositions[d.sector].y; }).strength(0.3))
            .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(function(d) { return d.radius + 2; }).iterations(3))
            .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(2))
            .on("tick", ticked);

        var circles = chartGroup.selectAll("circle")
            .data(data)
            .join("circle")
            .attr("r", function(d) { return d.radius; })
            .attr("fill", function(d) { return colorScale(d.sector); })
            .attr("stroke", "#fff")
            .attr("stroke-width", 1.5)
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; })
            .attr("cursor", "pointer");

        var labels = chartGroup.selectAll(".bubble-label")
            .data(data)
            .join("text")
            .attr("class", "bubble-label")
            .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
            .attr("dy", "0.35em")
            .style("font-size", function(d) {
                var maxLen = d.ticker.length;
                var fontSize = Math.min(d.radius * 1.4 / maxLen * 1.8, d.radius * 0.7);
                return Math.max(fontSize, 6) + "px";
            })
            .style("pointer-events", "none")
            .style("fill", "#fff")
            .style("font-weight", "600");

        function ticked() {
            circles
                .attr("cx", function(d) { return d.x = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(width - d.radius, d.x)); })
                .attr("cy", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(height - d.radius, d.y)); });
            labels
                .attr("x", function(d) { return d.x; })

(function() {
    const width = 700;
    const height = 600;
    const legendHeight = 80;
    const totalHeight = height + legendHeight;

    const svg = d3.select(\"#bubble-chart\")
        .attr(\"width\", width)
        .attr(\"height\", totalHeight);

    const chartGroup = svg.append(\"g\");

    const tooltip = d3.select(\"#tooltip\");

    const sectors = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"];

    const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain(sectors)
        .range([\"#e15759\", \"#76b7b2\", \"#4e79a7\", \"#f28e2b\", \"#59a14f\"]);

    const sectorPositions = {
        \"Energy\":                 { x: width * 0.2,  y: height * 0.3 },
        \"ETF\":                    { x: width * 0.5,  y: height * 0.7 },
        \"Financial\":              { x: width * 0.8,  y: height * 0.3 },
        \"Industry\":               { x: width * 0.2,  y: height * 0.7 },
        \"Information Technology\":  { x: width * 0.65, y: height * 0.5 }
    };

    function formatMarketCap(val) {
        if ("'!val || isNaN(val) || val === "") return "N/A";
        var num = +val;
        if (isNaN(num)) return "N/A";
        if (num >= 1e12) return (num / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
        if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
        if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
        return num.toString();
    }

    d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d["full name"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null
            };
        });

        var nonEtfCaps = data.filter(function(d) { return d.marketCap && d.marketCap > 0; }).map(function(d) { return d.marketCap; });
        var maxCap = d3.max(nonEtfCaps);
        var minCap = d3.min(nonEtfCaps);

        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([minCap, maxCap])
            .range([12, 45]);

        var etfRadius = 14;

        function getRadius(d) {
            if (d.sector === "ETF" || !d.marketCap) return etfRadius;
            return radiusScale(d.marketCap);
        }

        data.forEach(function(d) {
            d.radius = getRadius(d);
            d.x = sectorPositions[d.sector] ? sectorPositions[d.sector].x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50 : width / 2;
            d.y = sectorPositions[d.sector] ? sectorPositions[d.sector].y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50 : height / 2;
        });

        var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
            .force("x", d3.forceX(function(d) { return sectorPositions[d.sector].x; }).strength(0.3))
            .force("y", d3.forceY(function(d) { return sectorPositions[d.sector].y; }).strength(0.3))
            .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(function(d) { return d.radius + 2; }).iterations(3))
            .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(2))
            .on("tick", ticked);

        var circles = chartGroup.selectAll("circle")
            .data(data)
            .join("circle")
            .attr("r", function(d) { return d.radius; })
            .attr("fill", function(d) { return colorScale(d.sector); })
            .attr("stroke", "#fff")
            .attr("stroke-width", 1.5)
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; })
            .attr("cursor", "pointer");

        var labels = chartGroup.selectAll(".bubble-label")
            .data(data)
            .join("text")
            .attr("class", "bubble-label")
            .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
            .attr("dy", "0.35em")
            .style("font-size", function(d) {
                var maxLen = d.ticker.length;
                var fontSize = Math.min(d.radius * 1.4 / maxLen * 1.8, d.radius * 0.7);
                return Math.max(fontSize, 6) + "px";
            })
            .style("pointer-events", "none")
            .style("fill", "#fff")
            .style("font-weight", "600");

        function ticked() {
            circles
                .attr("cx", function(d) { return d.x = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(width - d.radius, d.x)); })
                .attr("cy", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(height - d.radius, d.y)); });
            labels
                .attr("x", function(d) { return d.x; })
                .attr("y", function(d) { return d.y; });
        }

        circles.on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
            if (d.sector === "ETF") {
                tooltip.style("opacity", "0");
                return;
            }
            tooltip
                .style("opacity", "1")
                .html("<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" + d.name + "<br>Sector: " + d.sector);
            tooltip
                .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
                .style("top", (event.pageY - 12) + "px");
        })
        .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
            if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
            tooltip
                .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
                .style("top", (event.pageY - 12) + "px");
        })
        .on("mouseout", function() {
            tooltip.style("opacity", "0");
        });

        circles.on("click", function(event, d) {
            d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
            d3.select(this).classed("highlighted", true);
            d3.selectAll("#stock-table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
            d3.select('"'#stock-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]').classed(\"highlighted\", true);
            var highlightedRow = document.querySelector('#stock-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]');
            if (highlightedRow) {
                highlightedRow.scrollIntoView({ block: \"center\", behavior: \"smooth\" });
            }
        });

        var legendGroup = svg.append(\"g\")
            .attr(\"transform\", \"translate(20,\" + (height + 10) + \")\");

        var legendSpacing = width / sectors.length;

        var legendItems = legendGroup.selectAll(\".legend-item\")
            .data(sectors)
            .join(\"g\")
            .attr(\"class\", \"legend-item\")
            .attr(\"transform\", function(d, i) { return \"translate(\" + (i * legendSpacing) + \", 0)\"; });

        legendItems.append(\"rect\")
            .attr(\"width\", 14)
            .attr(\"height\", 14)
            .attr(\"rx\", 3)
            .attr(\"fill\", function(d) { return colorScale(d); });

        legendItems.append(\"text\")
            .attr(\"x\", 18)
            .attr(\"y\", 11)
            .text(function(d) { return d; })
            .style(\"font-size\", \"11px\")
            .style(\"fill\", \"#333\");

        var tbody = d3.select(\"#stock-table tbody\");
        var rows = tbody.selectAll(\"tr\")
            .data(data)
            .join(\"tr\")
            .attr(\"data-ticker\", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr(\"cursor\", \"pointer\");

        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.ticker; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.name; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.sector; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return formatMarketCap(d.marketCap); });

        rows.on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
            d3.selectAll(\"#stock-table tbody tr\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
            d3.select(this).classed(\"highlighted\", true);
            d3.selectAll(\"circle\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
            d3.select('circle[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]').classed(\"highlighted\", true);
        });

        simulation.alpha(1).restart();
    });
})();
