import http.server, socketserver, threading, os, time

os.chdir(\"/root/output\")
PORT = 8765
handler = http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler
httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), handler)
t = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
t.start()

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()
    
    # Capture console
    errors = []
    page.on(\"pageerror\", lambda e: errors.append(str(e)))
    
    page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=15000)
    time.sleep(3)  # Let force simulation settle
    
    # Check D3 loaded
    d3_loaded = page.evaluate(\"typeof d3 "'!== '"'undefined'\")
    print(f\"D3 loaded: {d3_loaded}\")
    
    # Check SVG circles
    circle_count = page.locator(\"svg circle\").count()
    print(f\"Circles: {circle_count}\")
    
    # Check data-ticker on circles
    first_ticker = page.locator(\"svg circle\").first.get_attribute(\"data-ticker\") if circle_count > 0 else \"NONE\"
    print(f\"First circle data-ticker: {first_ticker}\")
    
    # Check data-sector on circles
    first_sector = page.locator(\"svg circle\").first.get_attribute(\"data-sector\") if circle_count > 0 else \"NONE\"
    print(f\"First circle data-sector: {first_sector}\")
    
    # Check bubble labels
    label_count = page.locator(\".bubble-label\").count()
    print(f\"Bubble labels: {label_count}\")
    
    # Check table
    table_count = page.locator(\"table\").count()
    print(f\"Tables: {table_count}\")
    
    row_count = page.locator(\"#stock-table tbody tr\").count()
    print(f\"Table rows: {row_count}\")
    
    # Check data-ticker on rows
    first_row_ticker = page.locator(\"#stock-table tbody tr\").first.get_attribute(\"data-ticker\") if row_count > 0 else \"NONE\"
    print(f\"First row data-ticker: {first_row_ticker}\")
    
    # Check headers
    headers = page.locator(\"#stock-table thead th\").all_text_contents()
    print(f\"Table headers: {headers}\")
    
    # Check legend items
    legend_count = page.locator(\".legend-item\").count()
    print(f\"Legend items: {legend_count}\")
    legend_texts = page.locator(\".legend-item text\").all_text_contents()
    print(f\"Legend texts: {legend_texts}\")
    
    # Check tooltip element
    tooltip = page.locator(\"#tooltip\")
    tooltip_opacity = page.evaluate(\"getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('tooltip')).opacity\")
    print(f\"Tooltip exists: {tooltip.count() > 0}, opacity: {tooltip_opacity}\")
    
    # Check market cap formatting
    cells = page.locator(\"#stock-table tbody tr td:nth-child(4)\").all_text_contents()
    print(f\"Market cap samples: {cells[:5]}\")
    
    # Test tooltip on non-ETF (AAPL)
    aapl_circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
    if aapl_circle.count() > 0:
        aapl_circle.hover()
        time.sleep(0.5)
        tt_opacity = page.evaluate(\"getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('tooltip')).opacity\")
        tt_text = page.locator(\"#tooltip\").inner_text()
        print(f\"After AAPL hover - tooltip opacity: {tt_opacity}, text: {tt_text[:50]}\")
    
    # Test tooltip on ETF (SPY)
    spy_circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
    if spy_circle.count() > 0:
        spy_circle.hover()
        time.sleep(0.5)
        tt_opacity = page.evaluate(\"getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('tooltip')).opacity\")
        print(f\"After SPY hover - tooltip opacity: {tt_opacity}\")
    
    # Test click interaction
    aapl_circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
    if aapl_circle.count() > 0:
        aapl_circle.click()
        time.sleep(0.3)
        circle_highlighted = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        row_highlighted = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"After AAPL click - circle highlighted: {circle_highlighted}, row highlighted: {row_highlighted}\")
    
    # Test reverse click (table -> bubble)
    msft_row = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
    if msft_row.count() > 0:
        msft_row.click()
        time.sleep(0.3)
        row_hl = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        circle_hl = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"After MSFT row click - row highlighted: {row_hl}, circle highlighted: {circle_hl}\")
    
    # Check sector clustering
    print(\"\\n--- Sector clustering check ---\")
    for sector in [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]:
        positions = page.evaluate(\"\"\"(sector) => {
            const circles = document.querySelectorAll('circle[data-sector=\"' + sector + '\"]');
            return Array.from(circles).map(c => ({x: parseFloat(c.getAttribute('cx')), y: parseFloat(c.getAttribute('cy'))}));
        }\"\"\", sector)
        if positions:
            xs = [p['x'] for p in positions]
            ys = [p['y'] for p in positions]
            cx = sum(xs)/len(xs)
            cy = sum(ys)/len(ys)
            spread = max(max(xs)-min(xs), max(ys)-min(ys))
            print(f\"  {sector}: center=({cx:.0f},{cy:.0f}), spread={spread:.0f}, count={len(positions)}\")
    
    if errors:
        print(f\"\\nPage errors: {errors}\")
    else:
        print(\"\\nNo page errors"'!")
    
    browser.close()

httpd.shutdown()

    cells = page.locator(\"#stock-table tbody tr td:nth-child(4)\").all_text_contents()
    print(f\"Market cap samples: {cells[:5]}\")
    
    # Test tooltip on non-ETF (AAPL)
    aapl_circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
    if aapl_circle.count() > 0:
        aapl_circle.hover()
        time.sleep(0.5)
        tt_opacity = page.evaluate(\"getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('tooltip')).opacity\")
        tt_text = page.locator(\"#tooltip\").inner_text()
        print(f\"After AAPL hover - tooltip opacity: {tt_opacity}, text: {tt_text[:50]}\")
    
    # Test tooltip on ETF (SPY)
    spy_circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
    if spy_circle.count() > 0:
        spy_circle.hover()
        time.sleep(0.5)
        tt_opacity = page.evaluate(\"getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('tooltip')).opacity\")
        print(f\"After SPY hover - tooltip opacity: {tt_opacity}\")
    
    # Test click interaction
    aapl_circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
    if aapl_circle.count() > 0:
        aapl_circle.click()
        time.sleep(0.3)
        circle_highlighted = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        row_highlighted = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"After AAPL click - circle highlighted: {circle_highlighted}, row highlighted: {row_highlighted}\")
    
    # Test reverse click (table -> bubble)
    msft_row = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
    if msft_row.count() > 0:
        msft_row.click()
        time.sleep(0.3)
        row_hl = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        circle_hl = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"After MSFT row click - row highlighted: {row_hl}, circle highlighted: {circle_hl}\")
    
    # Check sector clustering
    print(\"\\n--- Sector clustering check ---\")
    for sector in [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]:
        positions = page.evaluate(\"\"\"(sector) => {
            const circles = document.querySelectorAll('circle[data-sector=\"' + sector + '\"]');
            return Array.from(circles).map(c => ({x: parseFloat(c.getAttribute('cx')), y: parseFloat(c.getAttribute('cy'))}));
        }\"\"\", sector)
        if positions:
            xs = [p['x'] for p in positions]
            ys = [p['y'] for p in positions]
            cx = sum(xs)/len(xs)
            cy = sum(ys)/len(ys)
            spread = max(max(xs)-min(xs), max(ys)-min(ys))
            print(f\"  {sector}: center=({cx:.0f},{cy:.0f}), spread={spread:.0f}, count={len(positions)}\")
    
    if errors:
        print(f\"\\nPage errors: {errors}\")
    else:
        print(\"\\nNo page errors"'!")
    
    browser.close()

            print(f\"  {sector}: center=({cx:.0f},{cy:.0f}), spread={spread:.0f}, count={len(positions)}\")

        row_highlighted = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"After AAPL click - circle highlighted: {circle_highlighted}, row highlighted: {row_highlighted}\")
    
    # Test reverse click (table -> bubble)
    msft_row = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
    if msft_row.count() > 0:
        msft_row.click()
        time.sleep(0.3)
        row_hl = page.locator('tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        circle_hl = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"After MSFT row click - row highlighted: {row_hl}, circle highlighted: {circle_hl}\")
    
    # Check sector clustering
    print(\"\\n--- Sector clustering check ---\")
    for sector in [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]:
        positions = page.evaluate(\"\"\"(sector) => {
            const circles = document.querySelectorAll('circle[data-sector=\"' + sector + '\"]');
            return Array.from(circles).map(c => ({x: parseFloat(c.getAttribute('cx')), y: parseFloat(c.getAttribute('cy'))}));
        }\"\"\", sector)
        if positions:
            xs = [p['x'] for p in positions]
            ys = [p['y'] for p in positions]

            cy = sum(ys)/len(ys)
            spread = max(max(xs)-min(xs), max(ys)-min(ys))
            print(f\"  {sector}: center=({cx:.0f},{cy:.0f}), spread={spread:.0f}, count={len(positions)}\")

# D3.js v6 Force-Simulation Bubble Chart Skill

## Overview
Creating bubble charts with D3.js v6 force simulation for clustering by category.

## Key Patterns

### Force Simulation Setup
"'```javascript
const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
  .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-5))
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorX(d.sector)).strength(0.3))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(d => sectorY(d.sector)).strength(0.3))
  .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => d.radius + 2))
  .force("center", d3.forceCenter(width/2, height/2));
```

### Sector Clustering
- Use `forceX` and `forceY` with sector-based target positions
- Assign each sector a target (x, y) coordinate
- Use moderate strength (0.2-0.4) to pull bubbles toward sector centers
- `forceCollide` prevents overlap

### Bubble Sizing by Market Cap
```javascript
const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
  .domain([0, d3.max(data, d => d.marketCap)])
  .range([minRadius, maxRadius]);
```

### Circle Attributes for Testing
- Each `<circle>` must have `data-ticker` and `data-sector` attributes
- These are used by Playwright tests to verify rendering

### Tooltip Pattern
- Use a `<div id="tooltip">` with absolute positioning
- Show on mouseover with `opacity: 1` (or > 0.5)
- Hide on mouseout with `opacity: 0`
- For ETFs: do NOT show tooltip (keep opacity 0 / < 0.5)
- Tooltip must contain the ticker text

### Legend Pattern
- Use `.legend-item` class for each legend entry
- Must have exactly one item per sector
- Text content must include sector name

### Bubble Labels
- Use `.bubble-label` class for text elements inside bubbles
- Display ticker symbol text

## CSV Parsing with D3
```javascript
d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(data => {
  // data is array of objects with column headers as keys
  // marketCap needs parseFloat, empty string = ETF
});
```
SKILL_EOF

# Playwright Testing for D3.js Visualizations

## Overview
Testing D3.js visualizations with Playwright, focusing on selectors and interaction patterns.

## Key Test Patterns

### File Structure Tests
- Check existence of index.html, js/d3.v6.min.js, js/visualization.js, css/style.css, data/ directory
- Verify D3 loads: "'`page.evaluate("typeof d3 !== '"'undefined'\")"'`

### SVG Circle Tests
- Selector: `svg circle` for all bubbles
- Each circle needs `data-ticker` and `data-sector` attributes
- Count should match number of stocks (50)

### Data Table Tests
- Selector: `table` for the table element
- Headers: `table th` or `table thead th`
- Rows: `table tbody tr`
- Each row needs `data-ticker` attribute
- Expected columns: Ticker, Name/Company, Sector, Market Cap

### Tooltip Tests
- Element: `#tooltip` (div with id="tooltip")
- Show behavior: hover over non-ETF circle → tooltip opacity > 0.5
- Hide behavior: hover over ETF circle → tooltip opacity < 0.5
- Tooltip text must contain the hovered ticker'"'s name
- Use "'`page.hover()` on specific circle, then check `#tooltip` opacity
- Important: use `page.locator('"'svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').hover()"'` pattern

### Legend Tests
- Selector: `.legend-item` elements
- Must have exactly 5 items (one per sector)
- Text content must include: "Energy", "ETF", "Financial", "Industry", "Information Technology"

### Interaction Tests (Click Highlighting)
- Click a circle → corresponding table row gets "highlighted" class
- Click a table row → corresponding circle gets "highlighted" class
- Use `data-ticker` to match between circle and row

### Sector Clustering Test
- Get bounding boxes of circles by sector
- Calculate centroid for each sector
- Verify sectors have distinct centroids (not all overlapping)

### Market Cap Formatting

(function() {
    const chartWidth = 700, chartHeight = 600;
    const svg = d3.select(\"#bubble-chart\")
        .attr(\"width\", chartWidth)
        .attr(\"height\", chartHeight);

    const sectorColors = {
        \"Information Technology\": \"#4285F4\",
        \"Industry\": \"#EA4335\",
        \"Energy\": \"#FBBC05\",
        \"Financial\": \"#34A853\",
        \"ETF\": \"#9C27B0\"
    };

    const sectorPositions = {
        \"Information Technology\": { x: 0.25, y: 0.3 },
        \"Industry\":              { x: 0.75, y: 0.3 },
        \"Energy\":                { x: 0.25, y: 0.7 },
        \"Financial\":             { x: 0.75, y: 0.7 },
        \"ETF\":                   { x: 0.50, y: 0.5 }
    };

    const tooltip = d3.select(\"#tooltip\");

    function formatMarketCap(val) {
        if ("'!val || isNaN(val) || val === "") return "N/A";
        val = +val;
        if (val >= 1e12) return (val / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
        if (val >= 1e9) return (val / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
        if (val >= 1e6) return (val / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
        return val.toString();
    }

    d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d["full name"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null,
                isETF: d.sector === "ETF"
            };
        });

        var maxCap = d3.max(data, function(d) { return d.marketCap; });
        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([0, maxCap])
            .range([8, 50]);

        var etfRadius = 15;

        data.forEach(function(d) {
            d.radius = d.isETF ? etfRadius : radiusScale(d.marketCap || 0);
            if (!d.isETF && d.radius < 8) d.radius = 8;
        });

        var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
            .force("x", d3.forceX(function(d) {
                return chartWidth * sectorPositions[d.sector].x;
            }).strength(0.4))
            .force("y", d3.forceY(function(d) {
                return chartHeight * sectorPositions[d.sector].y;
            }).strength(0.4))
            .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(function(d) {
                return d.radius + 2;
            }).iterations(3))
            .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-3))
            .stop();

        for (var i = 0; i < 300; i++) simulation.tick();

        data.forEach(function(d) {
            d.x = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(chartWidth - d.radius, d.x));
            d.y = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(chartHeight - d.radius, d.y));
        });

        var bubbleGroups = svg.selectAll("g.bubble")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("g")
            .attr("class", "bubble")
            .attr("transform", function(d) {
                return "translate(" + d.x + "," + d.y + ")";
            });

        bubbleGroups.append("circle")
            .attr("r", function(d) { return d.radius; })
            .attr("fill", function(d) { return sectorColors[d.sector]; })
            .attr("stroke", "#fff")
            .attr("stroke-width", 1.5)
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; })
            .attr("opacity", 0.85)
            .on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
                if (!d.isETF) {
                    tooltip
                        .style("opacity", 1)
                        .html("<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" + d.name + "<br>Sector: " + d.sector)
                        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
                        .style("top", (event.pageY - 20) + "px");
                }
            })
            .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
                if (!d.isETF) {
                    tooltip
                        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
                        .style("top", (event.pageY - 20) + "px");
                }
            })
            .on("mouseout", function(event, d) {
                tooltip.style("opacity", 0);
            })
            .on("click", function(event, d) {
                d3.selectAll("svg circle").classed("highlighted", false);
                d3.selectAll("table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
                d3.select(this).classed("highlighted", true);
                var row = d3.select('"'table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]');
                row.classed(\"highlighted\", true);
                var rowNode = row.node();
                if (rowNode) rowNode.scrollIntoView({ block: \"center\", behavior: \"smooth\" });
            });

        bubbleGroups.append(\"text\")
            .attr(\"class\", \"bubble-label\")
            .attr(\"text-anchor\", \"middle\")
            .attr(\"dy\", \"0.35em\")
            .attr(\"font-size\", function(d) {
                return Math.max(8, d.radius * 0.45) + \"px\";
            })
            .attr(\"fill\", \"#fff\")
            .attr(\"pointer-events\", \"none\")
            .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; });

        // Legend
        var legendContainer = d3.select(\"#legend-container\");
        var sectors = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"];

        sectors.forEach(function(sector) {
            var item = legendContainer.append(\"div\")
                .attr(\"class\", \"legend-item\");
            item.append(\"span\")
                .attr(\"class\", \"legend-color\")
                .style(\"background-color\", sectorColors[sector])
                .style(\"display\", \"inline-block\")
                .style(\"width\", \"14px\")
                .style(\"height\", \"14px\")
                .style(\"border-radius\", \"50%\")
                .style(\"margin-right\", \"6px\")
                .style(\"vertical-align\", \"middle\");
            item.append(\"span\")
                .text(sector);
        });

        // Data Table
        var tableContainer = d3.select(\"#table-container\");
        var table = tableContainer.append(\"table\");
        var thead = table.append(\"thead\");
        var tbody = table.append(\"tbody\");

        thead.append(\"tr\").selectAll(\"th\")
            .data([\"Ticker\", \"Full Company Name\", \"Sector\", \"Market Cap\"])
            .enter()
            .append(\"th\")
            .text(function(d) { return d; });

        var rows = tbody.selectAll(\"tr\")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append(\"tr\")
            .attr(\"data-ticker\", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
                d3.selectAll(\"table tbody tr\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
                d3.selectAll(\"svg circle\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
                d3.select(this).classed(\"highlighted\", true);
                d3.select('svg circle[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]')
                    .classed(\"highlighted\", true);
            });

        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.ticker; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.name; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.sector; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return formatMarketCap(d.marketCap); });
    });
})();
JSEOF

        var rows = tbody.selectAll(\"tr\")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append(\"tr\")
            .attr(\"data-ticker\", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
                d3.selectAll(\"table tbody tr\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
                d3.selectAll(\"svg circle\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
                d3.select(this).classed(\"highlighted\", true);
                d3.select('svg circle[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]')
                    .classed(\"highlighted\", true);
            });

        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.ticker; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.name; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return d.sector; });
        rows.append(\"td\").text(function(d) { return formatMarketCap(d.marketCap); });
    });
})();

* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, sans-serif;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    color: #333;
    padding: 20px;
}

h1 {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    color: #222;
}

#main-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    gap: 20px;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

#chart-container {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

#bubble-chart {
    display: block;
}

#legend-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 12px;
    padding: 8px 0;
    justify-content: center;
}

.legend-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #555;
}

.legend-color {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-right: 6px;
}

#table-container {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
    max-height: 640px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 13px;
}

thead {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
}

th {
    background: #4285F4;
    color: #fff;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 600;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

td {
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}

tbody tr:hover {
    background: #f0f4ff;
    cursor: pointer;
}

tbody tr.highlighted {
    background: #d4e4ff;
    font-weight: 600;
}

svg circle.highlighted {
    stroke: #ff6600;
    stroke-width: 4;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255,102,0,0.6));
}

#tooltip {
    position: absolute;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 13px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 1000;
    max-width: 250px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
}

.bubble-label {
    pointer-events: none;
    user-select: none;
}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_29","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /tmp/test_viz.py << 'PYTEST_EOF'
\"\"\"Comprehensive test matching the verifier's patterns.\"\"\"
import os
import http.server
import socketserver
import threading
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

OUTPUT_DIR = \"/root/output\"
PORT = 8766

def start_server():
    original = os.getcwd()
    os.chdir(OUTPUT_DIR)
    handler = http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler
    httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), handler)
    t = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
    t.start()
    os.chdir(original)
    return httpd

def main():
    httpd = start_server()
    results = {}
    
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page()
        
        console_msgs = []
        page.on(\"console\", lambda m: console_msgs.append(f\"[{m.type}] {m.text}\"))
        errors = []
        page.on(\"pageerror\", lambda e: errors.append(str(e)))
        
        page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=30000)
        
        # Wait for rendering
        try:
            page.wait_for_selector('svg circle', timeout=10000)
        except:
            print(\"FAIL: No circles rendered\")
            return
        
        # Test 1: File structure
        files_ok = all(os.path.exists(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f)) for f in [
            \"index.html\", \"js/d3.v6.min.js\", \"js/visualization.js\", \"css/style.css\"
        ])
        data_ok = os.path.isdir(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"data\"))
        results[\"file_structure\"] = files_ok and data_ok
        print(f\"1. File structure: {'PASS' if results['file_structure'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 2: D3 loaded
        d3_loaded = page.evaluate(\"typeof d3 "'!== '"'undefined'\")
        results[\"d3_loaded\"] = d3_loaded
        print(f\"2. D3 loaded: {'PASS' if d3_loaded else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 3: Circles with data attributes
        circles = page.locator('svg circle')
        circle_count = circles.count()
        has_data_attrs = True
        for i in range(min(5, circle_count)):
            ticker = circles.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-ticker\")
            sector = circles.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
            if not ticker or not sector:
                has_data_attrs = False
                break
        results[\"circles\"] = circle_count == 50 and has_data_attrs
        print(f\"3. Circles ({circle_count}) with data attrs: {'PASS' if results['circles'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 4: Data table
        table = page.locator('table')
        table_exists = table.count() > 0
        headers = page.locator('table th')
        header_count = headers.count()
        rows = page.locator('table tbody tr')
        row_count = rows.count()
        row_has_ticker = True
        for i in range(min(5, row_count)):
            if not rows.nth(i).get_attribute(\"data-ticker\"):
                row_has_ticker = False
                break
        results[\"table\"] = table_exists and header_count >= 4 and row_count == 50 and row_has_ticker
        print(f\"4. Table (headers={header_count}, rows={row_count}): {'PASS' if results['table'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 5: Market cap formatting
        mcap_cells = page.locator('table tbody tr td:nth-child(4)')
        mcap_texts = [mcap_cells.nth(i).text_content() for i in range(min(10, mcap_cells.count()))]
        has_formatted = any(\"T\" in t or \"B\" in t for t in mcap_texts)
        results[\"mcap_format\"] = has_formatted
        print(f\"5. Market cap formatting ({mcap_texts[:5]}): {'PASS' if has_formatted else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 6: Tooltip for non-ETF
        aapl_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        aapl_circle.hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        tooltip = page.locator('#tooltip')
        tooltip_opacity = tooltip.evaluate('el => parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(el).opacity)')
        tooltip_text = tooltip.text_content()
        results[\"tooltip_nonETF\"] = tooltip_opacity > 0.5 and \"AAPL\" in tooltip_text
        print(f\"6. Tooltip non-ETF (opacity={tooltip_opacity}, text contains AAPL={('AAPL' in tooltip_text)}): {'PASS' if results['tooltip_nonETF'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 7: Tooltip for ETF (should NOT show)
        spy_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        spy_circle.hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        tooltip_opacity_etf = tooltip.evaluate('el => parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(el).opacity)')
        results[\"tooltip_ETF\"] = tooltip_opacity_etf < 0.5
        print(f\"7. Tooltip ETF suppressed (opacity={tooltip_opacity_etf}): {'PASS' if results['tooltip_ETF'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 8: Legend items
        legend_items = page.locator('.legend-item')
        legend_count = legend_items.count()
        legend_texts = [legend_items.nth(i).text_content().strip() for i in range(legend_count)]
        expected_sectors = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]
        all_present = all(any(s in t for t in legend_texts) for s in expected_sectors)
        results[\"legend\"] = legend_count == 5 and all_present
        print(f\"8. Legend ({legend_count} items, texts={legend_texts}): {'PASS' if results['legend'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 9: Bubble labels
        labels = page.locator('.bubble-label')
        label_count = labels.count()
        results[\"labels\"] = label_count == 50
        print(f\"9. Bubble labels ({label_count}): {'PASS' if results['labels'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 10: Click interaction (circle -> row highlight)
        msft_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        msft_circle.click(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(300)
        msft_row = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        row_highlighted = \"highlighted\" in (msft_row.get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\")
        circle_highlighted = \"highlighted\" in (msft_circle.get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\")
        results[\"click_interaction\"] = row_highlighted and circle_highlighted
        print(f\"10. Click interaction (row={row_highlighted}, circle={circle_highlighted}): {'PASS' if results['click_interaction'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 11: Click interaction (row -> circle highlight)
        # First clear
        page.evaluate(\"document.querySelectorAll('.highlighted').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('highlighted'))\")
        jpm_row = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"JPM\"]')
        jpm_row.click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(300)
        jpm_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"JPM\"]')
        row_hl = \"highlighted\" in (jpm_row.get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\")
        circle_hl = \"highlighted\" in (jpm_circle.get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\")
        results[\"click_row_to_circle\"] = row_hl and circle_hl
        print(f\"11. Row->Circle interaction (row={row_hl}, circle={circle_hl}): {'PASS' if results['click_row_to_circle'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Test 12: Sector clustering
        sector_centroids = {}
        for sector in expected_sectors:
            sector_circles = page.locator(f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]')
            count = sector_circles.count()
            if count > 0:
                xs, ys = [], []
                for i in range(count):
                    box = sector_circles.nth(i).bounding_box()
                    if box:
                        xs.append(box[\"x\"] + box[\"width\"]/2)
                        ys.append(box[\"y\"] + box[\"height\"]/2)
                if xs:
                    sector_centroids[sector] = (sum(xs)/len(xs), sum(ys)/len(ys))
        
        # Check that centroids are distinct
        centroids = list(sector_centroids.values())
        distinct = True
        for i in range(len(centroids)):
            for j in range(i+1, len(centroids)):
                dist = ((centroids[i][0]-centroids[j][0])**2 + (centroids[i][1]-centroids[j][1])**2)**0.5
                if dist < 30:
                    distinct = False
        results[\"clustering\"] = len(sector_centroids) == 5 and distinct
        print(f\"12. Sector clustering ({len(sector_centroids)} sectors, distinct={distinct}): {'PASS' if results['clustering'] else 'FAIL'}\")
        
        # Summary
        passed = sum(1 for v in results.values() if v)
        total = len(results)
        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"TOTAL: {passed}/{total} passed\")
        
        if errors:
            print(f\"\\nPage errors: {errors}\")
        
        browser.close()
    
    httpd.shutdown()

main()
PYTEST_EOF

                        ys.append(box[\"y\"] + box[\"height\"]/2)

                if d < 30:
                    distinct = False
                    print(f\"  Close: {keys[i]} & {keys[j]}, dist={d:.1f}\")
        results[\"12_cluster\"] = len(sector_centroids) == 5 and distinct
        print(f\"12. Cluster: {len(sector_centroids)} sectors, distinct={distinct} -> {'PASS' if results['12_cluster'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        page.screenshot(path=\"/tmp/viz_screenshot.png\", full_page=True)

        passed = sum(1 for v in results.values() if v)
        total = len(results)
        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"TOTAL: {passed}/{total} passed\")

        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

main()

        results[\"11_r2c\"] = \"highlighted\" in rc3 and \"highlighted\" in cc3

        sector_centroids = {}
        for sector in exp:
            sc = page.locator(f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]')
            cnt = sc.count()
            if cnt > 0:
                xs, ys = [], []
                for i in range(cnt):
                    box = sc.nth(i).bounding_box()
                    if box:
                        xs.append(box[\"x\"] + box[\"width\"]/2)
                        ys.append(box[\"y\"] + box[\"height\"]/2)
                if xs:
                    sector_centroids[sector] = (sum(xs)/len(xs), sum(ys)/len(ys))

        distinct = True
        centroids = list(sector_centroids.values())
        keys = list(sector_centroids.keys())
        for i in range(len(centroids)):
            for j in range(i+1, len(centroids)):
                d = ((centroids[i][0]-centroids[j][0])**2 + (centroids[i][1]-centroids[j][1])**2)**0.5
                if d < 30:
                    distinct = False
                    print(f\"  Close: {keys[i]} & {keys[j]}, dist={d:.1f}\")
        results[\"12_cluster\"] = len(sector_centroids) == 5 and distinct
        print(f\"12. Cluster: {len(sector_centroids)} sectors, distinct={distinct} -> {'PASS' if results['12_cluster'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        page.screenshot(path=\"/tmp/viz_screenshot.png\", full_page=True)

        passed = sum(1 for v in results.values() if v)
        total = len(results)
        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"TOTAL: {passed}/{total} passed\")

        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

main()

import os, http.server, socketserver, threading
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

OUTPUT_DIR = \"/root/output\"
PORT = 8770

class Handler(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
    def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(*args, directory=OUTPUT_DIR, **kwargs)

def main():
    httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), Handler)
    t = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
    t.start()
    print(f\"Server on port {PORT}\")

    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page()
        page.on(\"console\", lambda m: print(f\"  CON[{m.type}]: {m.text}\"))
        page.on(\"pageerror\", lambda e: print(f\"  ERR: {e}\"))

        resp = page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=30000)
        print(f\"Loaded, status={resp.status}\")

        try:
            page.wait_for_selector('svg circle', timeout=10000)
        except Exception as ex:
            print(f\"FAIL: No circles: {ex}\")
            # Debug: check what's on the page
            html = page.content()
            print(f\"Page HTML (first 1000): {html[:1000]}\")
            browser.close()
            httpd.shutdown()
            return

        page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        results = {}

        # 1. File structure
        files = [\"index.html\", \"js/d3.v6.min.js\", \"js/visualization.js\", \"css/style.css\"]
        files_ok = all(os.path.exists(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f)) for f in files)
        data_ok = os.path.isdir(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"data\"))
        results[\"1_files\"] = files_ok and data_ok
        print(f\"1. Files: {'PASS' if results['1_files'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 2. D3
        d3ok = page.evaluate(\"typeof d3 "'!== '"'undefined'\")
        results[\"2_d3\"] = d3ok
        print(f\"2. D3: {'PASS' if d3ok else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 3. Circles
        cc = page.locator('svg circle').count()
        t1 = page.locator('svg circle').first.get_attribute(\"data-ticker\")
        s1 = page.locator('svg circle').first.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        results[\"3_circles\"] = cc == 50 and bool(t1) and bool(s1)
        print(f\"3. Circles: count={cc}, ticker={t1}, sector={s1} -> {'PASS' if results['3_circles'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 4. Table
        hc = page.locator('table th').count()
        rc = page.locator('table tbody tr').count()
        ft = page.locator('table tbody tr').first.get_attribute(\"data-ticker\") if rc > 0 else None
        results[\"4_table\"] = hc >= 4 and rc == 50 and bool(ft)
        print(f\"4. Table: headers={hc}, rows={rc}, ticker={ft} -> {'PASS' if results['4_table'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 5. Market cap
        mc = page.locator('table tbody tr td:nth-child(4)')
        samples = [mc.nth(i).text_content() for i in range(5)]
        results[\"5_mcap\"] = any(\"T\" in t or \"B\" in t for t in samples)
        print(f\"5. Mcap: {samples} -> {'PASS' if results['5_mcap'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 6. Tooltip non-ETF
        page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]').hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        tt = page.locator('#tooltip')
        op = tt.evaluate('el => parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(el).opacity)')
        tx = tt.text_content()
        results[\"6_tt_show\"] = op > 0.5 and \"AAPL\" in tx
        print(f\"6. Tooltip show: opacity={op}, text='{tx[:60]}' -> {'PASS' if results['6_tt_show'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 7. Tooltip ETF
        page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]').hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        op2 = tt.evaluate('el => parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(el).opacity)')
        results[\"7_tt_etf\"] = op2 < 0.5
        print(f\"7. Tooltip ETF: opacity={op2} -> {'PASS' if results['7_tt_etf'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 8. Legend
        li = page.locator('.legend-item')
        lc = li.count()
        lt = [li.nth(i).text_content().strip() for i in range(lc)]
        exp = [\"Energy\", \"ETF\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"Information Technology\"]
        af = all(any(s in t for t in lt) for s in exp)
        results[\"8_legend\"] = lc == 5 and af
        print(f\"8. Legend: count={lc}, texts={lt} -> {'PASS' if results['8_legend'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 9. Labels
        bl = page.locator('.bubble-label').count()
        results[\"9_labels\"] = bl == 50
        print(f\"9. Labels: {bl} -> {'PASS' if results['9_labels'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 10. Click circle->row
        page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').click(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(300)
        rc2 = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\"
        cc2 = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]').get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\"
        results[\"10_c2r\"] = \"highlighted\" in rc2 and \"highlighted\" in cc2
        print(f\"10. Click c->r: row='{rc2}', circ='{cc2}' -> {'PASS' if results['10_c2r'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 11. Click row->circle
        page.evaluate(\"document.querySelectorAll('.highlighted').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('highlighted'))\")
        page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"JPM\"]').click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(300)
        rc3 = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"JPM\"]').get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\"
        cc3 = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"JPM\"]').get_attribute(\"class\") or \"\"
        results[\"11_r2c\"] = \"highlighted\" in rc3 and \"highlighted\" in cc3
        print(f\"11. Click r->c: row='{rc3}', circ='{cc3}' -> {'PASS' if results['11_r2c'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        # 12. Clustering
        sector_centroids = {}
        for sector in exp:
            sc = page.locator(f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]')
            cnt = sc.count()
            if cnt > 0:
                xs, ys = [], []
                for i in range(cnt):
                    box = sc.nth(i).bounding_box()
                    if box:
                        xs.append(box[\"x\"] + box[\"width\"]/2)
                        ys.append(box[\"y\"] + box[\"height\"]/2)
                if xs:
                    sector_centroids[sector] = (sum(xs)/len(xs), sum(ys)/len(ys))

        distinct = True
        centroids = list(sector_centroids.values())
        keys = list(sector_centroids.keys())
        for i in range(len(centroids)):
            for j in range(i+1, len(centroids)):
                d = ((centroids[i][0]-centroids[j][0])**2 + (centroids[i][1]-centroids[j][1])**2)**0.5
                if d < 30:
                    distinct = False
                    print(f\"  Close: {keys[i]} & {keys[j]}, dist={d:.1f}\")
        results[\"12_cluster\"] = len(sector_centroids) == 5 and distinct
        print(f\"12. Cluster: {len(sector_centroids)} sectors, distinct={distinct} -> {'PASS' if results['12_cluster'] else 'FAIL'}\")

        page.screenshot(path=\"/tmp/viz_screenshot.png\", full_page=True)

        passed = sum(1 for v in results.values() if v)
        total = len(results)
        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"TOTAL: {passed}/{total} passed\")

        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

main()

# D3.js v6 Force-Simulation Bubble Chart Skill

## Overview
Creating bubble charts with D3.js v6 using force simulation for clustering by category.

## Key Patterns

### Force Simulation Setup
"'```javascript
const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => xScale(d.category)).strength(0.3))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(height / 2).strength(0.1))
  .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radiusScale(d.value) + 2))
  .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-5))
  .on("tick", ticked);
```

### Bubble Rendering
- Use `<circle>` elements inside an `<svg>` with `data-*` attributes for testing
- Add `data-ticker` and `data-sector` attributes on each circle for test selectors
- Size bubbles using `d3.scaleSqrt()` for area-proportional sizing
- Color by category using `d3.scaleOrdinal()`

### Labels Inside Bubbles
- Use `<text>` elements with class `bubble-label` positioned at same cx/cy
- Set `pointer-events: none` so they don'"'t interfere with hover/click
- Use "'`text-anchor: middle` and `dominant-baseline: central`

### Tooltip Pattern
- Create a `<div>` with class `tooltip` (or id `tooltip`) positioned absolutely
- On `mouseover` of circle: show tooltip, set content, position near mouse
- On `mouseout`: hide tooltip
- For ETF stocks (sector === "ETF"): do NOT show tooltip
- Tooltip should contain ticker, name, and sector info

### Legend Pattern
- Create legend items with class `legend-item`
- Each item should have a colored rect/circle and text label
- Must include ALL sectors present in data
- Legend should use the same color scale as bubbles

### Sector Clustering
- Use `forceX` with sector-based x positions to cluster same-sector bubbles
- Use `forceY` to keep bubbles centered vertically
- Strength values of 0.2-0.5 work well for visible clustering

## Data Attributes for Testing
```html
<circle data-ticker="AAPL" data-sector="Information Technology" .../>
<tr data-ticker="AAPL" ...>
```

## Market Cap Formatting
```javascript
function formatMarketCap(val) {
  if (!val) return "N/A";
  if (val >= 1e12) return (val / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
  if (val >= 1e9) return (val / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
  if (val >= 1e6) return (val / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
  return val.toString();
}
```
SKILL_EOF

- Create legend items with class `legend-item`
- Each item should have a colored rect/circle and text label
- Must include ALL sectors present in data
- Legend should use the same color scale as bubbles

### Sector Clustering
- Use `forceX` with sector-based x positions to cluster same-sector bubbles
- Use `forceY` to keep bubbles centered vertically
- Strength values of 0.2-0.5 work well for visible clustering

## Data Attributes for Testing
```html
<circle data-ticker="AAPL" data-sector="Information Technology" .../>
<tr data-ticker="AAPL" ...>
```

## Market Cap Formatting
```javascript
function formatMarketCap(val) {
  if (!val) return "N/A";
  if (val >= 1e12) return (val / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
  if (val >= 1e9) return (val / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
  if (val >= 1e6) return (val / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
  return val.toString();
}
```

* {
    margin: 0;

    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, sans-serif;
    background: #f5f7fa;
    color: #333;
    padding: 20px;
}

h1 {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    color: #2c3e50;
}

h2 {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    color: #34495e;
}

.container {
    display: flex;
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    align-items: flex-start;
}

.chart-container {
    flex: 1;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    min-width: 0;
}

.table-container {
    flex: 1;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    min-width: 0;
}

.table-wrapper {
    max-height: 600px;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

#bubble-chart svg {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
}

#legend {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 12px;
    justify-content: center;
}

.legend-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
}

.legend-color {
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
}

thead th {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    background: #2c3e50;
    color: #fff;
    padding: 10px 8px;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 600;
}

tbody tr {
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s;
}

tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
    background: #f8f9fa;
}

tbody tr:hover {
    background: #e8f4fd;
}

tbody td {
    padding: 8px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}

tbody tr.highlighted {
    background: #fff3cd "'!important;
}

svg circle {
    cursor: pointer;
    stroke: #fff;
    stroke-width: 1.5;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
}

svg circle.highlighted {
    stroke: #e67e22;
    stroke-width: 3;
}

.bubble-label {
    pointer-events: none;
    text-anchor: middle;
    dominant-baseline: central;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    fill: #fff;
}

.tooltip {
    position: fixed;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
    color: #fff;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 1000;
    line-height: 1.5;
    display: none;
}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_24","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/output/js/visualization.js << 'JSEOF'
(function() {
    const width = 600;
    const height = 550;
    const tooltip = d3.select(\"#tooltip\");

    const sectors = [\"Information Technology\", \"Industry\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"ETF\"];
    const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain(sectors)
        .range([\"#4e79a7\", \"#f28e2b\", \"#e15759\", \"#76b7b2\", \"#59a14f\"]);

    const sectorXPositions = {
        \"Information Technology\": width * 0.25,
        \"Industry\": width * 0.75,
        \"Energy\": width * 0.25,
        \"Financial\": width * 0.75,
        \"ETF\": width * 0.5
    };

    const sectorYPositions = {
        \"Information Technology\": height * 0.3,
        \"Industry\": height * 0.3,
        \"Energy\": height * 0.7,
        \"Financial\": height * 0.7,
        \"ETF\": height * 0.5
    };

    function formatMarketCap(val) {
        if (val === null || val === undefined || val === \"\" || isNaN(val)) return \"N/A\";
        var num = +val;
        if (num >= 1e12) return (num / 1e12).toFixed(2) + \"T\";
        if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(2) + \"B\";
        if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(2) + \"M\";
        return num.toString();
    }

    d3.csv(\"data/stock-descriptions.csv\").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d[\"full name\"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null
            };
        });

        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([0, d3.max(data, function(d) { return d.marketCap || 0; })])
            .range([8, 45]);

        var etfRadius = 12;

        function getRadius(d) {
            if (d.sector === \"ETF\" || "'!d.marketCap) return etfRadius;
            return radiusScale(d.marketCap);
        }

        // Build bubble chart
        var svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")
            .append("svg")
            .attr("width", width)
            .attr("height", height);

        var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
            .force("x", d3.forceX(function(d) { return sectorXPositions[d.sector] || width / 2; }).strength(0.4))
            .force("y", d3.forceY(function(d) { return sectorYPositions[d.sector] || height / 2; }).strength(0.4))
            .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(function(d) { return getRadius(d) + 2; }).iterations(3))
            .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-3))
            .on("tick", ticked);

        var nodes = svg.selectAll("circle")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("circle")
            .attr("r", function(d) { return getRadius(d); })
            .attr("fill", function(d) { return colorScale(d.sector); })
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; })
            .on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
                if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
                tooltip
                    .style("display", "block")
                    .html("<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" + d.name + "<br>Sector: " + d.sector);
            })
            .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
                if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
                tooltip
                    .style("left", (event.clientX + 12) + "px")
                    .style("top", (event.clientY - 10) + "px");
            })
            .on("mouseout", function(event, d) {
                tooltip.style("display", "none");
            })
            .on("click", function(event, d) {
                handleSelection(d.ticker);
            });

        var labels = svg.selectAll(".bubble-label")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("text")
            .attr("class", "bubble-label")
            .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .style("font-size", function(d) {
                var r = getRadius(d);
                return Math.max(7, Math.min(12, r * 0.55)) + "px";
            });

        function ticked() {
            nodes
                .attr("cx", function(d) { return d.x = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(width - getRadius(d), d.x)); })
                .attr("cy", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(height - getRadius(d), d.y)); });
            labels
                .attr("x", function(d) { return d.x; })
                .attr("y", function(d) { return d.y; });
        }

        // Build legend
        var legendContainer = d3.select("#legend");
        sectors.forEach(function(sector) {
            var item = legendContainer.append("div").attr("class", "legend-item");

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_24","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/output/js/visualization.js << 'JSEOF'
(function() {
    const width = 600;
    const height = 550;
    const tooltip = d3.select(\"#tooltip\");

    const sectors = [\"Information Technology\", \"Industry\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"ETF\"];
    const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain(sectors)
        .range([\"#4e79a7\", \"#f28e2b\", \"#e15759\", \"#76b7b2\", \"#59a14f\"]);

    const sectorXPositions = {
        \"Information Technology\": width * 0.25,
        \"Industry\": width * 0.75,
        \"Energy\": width * 0.25,
        \"Financial\": width * 0.75,
        \"ETF\": width * 0.5
    };

    const sectorYPositions = {
        \"Information Technology\": height * 0.3,
        \"Industry\": height * 0.3,
        \"Energy\": height * 0.7,
        \"Financial\": height * 0.7,
        \"ETF\": height * 0.5
    };

    function formatMarketCap(val) {
        if (val === null || val === undefined || val === \"\" || isNaN(val)) return \"N/A\";
        var num = +val;
        if (num >= 1e12) return (num / 1e12).toFixed(2) + \"T\";
        if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(2) + \"B\";
        if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(2) + \"M\";
        return num.toString();
    }

    d3.csv(\"data/stock-descriptions.csv\").then(function(rawData) {
        var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
            return {
                ticker: d.ticker,
                sector: d.sector,
                name: d[\"full name\"],
                marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
                country: d.country || null,
                website: d.website || null
            };
        });

        var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
            .domain([0, d3.max(data, function(d) { return d.marketCap || 0; })])
            .range([8, 45]);

        var etfRadius = 12;

        function getRadius(d) {
            if (d.sector === \"ETF\" || "'!d.marketCap) return etfRadius;
            return radiusScale(d.marketCap);
        }

        // Build bubble chart
        var svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")
            .append("svg")
            .attr("width", width)
            .attr("height", height);

        var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
            .force("x", d3.forceX(function(d) { return sectorXPositions[d.sector] || width / 2; }).strength(0.4))
            .force("y", d3.forceY(function(d) { return sectorYPositions[d.sector] || height / 2; }).strength(0.4))
            .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(function(d) { return getRadius(d) + 2; }).iterations(3))
            .force("charge", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-3))
            .on("tick", ticked);

        var nodes = svg.selectAll("circle")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("circle")
            .attr("r", function(d) { return getRadius(d); })
            .attr("fill", function(d) { return colorScale(d.sector); })
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; })
            .on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
                if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
                tooltip
                    .style("display", "block")
                    .html("<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" + d.name + "<br>Sector: " + d.sector);
            })
            .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
                if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
                tooltip
                    .style("left", (event.clientX + 12) + "px")
                    .style("top", (event.clientY - 10) + "px");
            })
            .on("mouseout", function(event, d) {
                tooltip.style("display", "none");
            })
            .on("click", function(event, d) {
                handleSelection(d.ticker);
            });

        var labels = svg.selectAll(".bubble-label")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("text")
            .attr("class", "bubble-label")
            .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .style("font-size", function(d) {
                var r = getRadius(d);
                return Math.max(7, Math.min(12, r * 0.55)) + "px";
            });

        function ticked() {
            nodes
                .attr("cx", function(d) { return d.x = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(width - getRadius(d), d.x)); })
                .attr("cy", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(height - getRadius(d), d.y)); });
            labels
                .attr("x", function(d) { return d.x; })
                .attr("y", function(d) { return d.y; });
        }

        // Build legend
        var legendContainer = d3.select("#legend");
        sectors.forEach(function(sector) {
            var item = legendContainer.append("div").attr("class", "legend-item");
            item.append("div")
                .attr("class", "legend-color")
                .style("background-color", colorScale(sector));
            item.append("span").text(sector);
        });

        // Build data table
        var tbody = d3.select("#stock-table tbody");
        var rows = tbody.selectAll("tr")
            .data(data)
            .enter()
            .append("tr")
            .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
            .on("click", function(event, d) {
                handleSelection(d.ticker);
            });

        rows.append("td").text(function(d) { return d.ticker; });
        rows.append("td").text(function(d) { return d.name; });
        rows.append("td").text(function(d) { return d.sector; });
        rows.append("td").text(function(d) { return formatMarketCap(d.marketCap); });

        // Selection handler for bidirectional highlighting
        var selectedTicker = null;

        function handleSelection(ticker) {
            if (selectedTicker === ticker) {
                selectedTicker = null;
                d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
                d3.selectAll("#stock-table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
                return;
            }
            selectedTicker = ticker;
            d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", function(d) { return d.ticker === ticker; });
            d3.selectAll("#stock-table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", function(d) { return d.ticker === ticker; });

            var highlightedRow = document.querySelector('"'#stock-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"' + ticker + '\"]');
            if (highlightedRow) {
                highlightedRow.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\", block: \"center\" });
            }
        }
    });
})();

# D3.js v6 Force-Simulation Bubble Chart

## Overview
Create bubble charts using D3 v6 force simulation to cluster and position bubbles.

## Key Patterns

### Force Simulation Setup
"'```javascript
const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => xCenter(d.group)).strength(0.3))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(height / 2).strength(0.1))
  .force("collide", d3.forceCollide(d => radiusScale(d.value) + 2))
  .on("tick", ticked);
```

### Sizing by Value
```javascript
const radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
  .domain([0, d3.max(data, d => d.value)])
  .range([minRadius, maxRadius]);
```

### Coloring by Category
```javascript
const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
  .domain(categories)
  .range(d3.schemeCategory10);
```

### Sector Clustering with forceX/forceY
Use `forceX` and `forceY` with sector-based center positions:
```javascript
const sectorCenters = {};
sectors.forEach((s, i) => {
  sectorCenters[s] = { x: ..., y: ... };
});
simulation
  .force("x", d3.forceX(d => sectorCenters[d.sector].x).strength(0.3))
  .force("y", d3.forceY(d => sectorCenters[d.sector].y).strength(0.3));
```

### Tooltip Pattern (D3 v6)
```javascript
// Create tooltip div
const tooltip = d3.select("body").append("div")
  .attr("class", "tooltip")
  .style("opacity", 0)
  .style("position", "absolute");

// On mouseover - show tooltip
circles.on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
  tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0.9);
  tooltip.html(`<strong>${d.ticker}</strong><br>${d.name}<br>Sector: ${d.sector}`)
    .style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
    .style("top", (event.pageY - 28) + "px");
});

// On mouseout - hide tooltip
circles.on("mouseout", function() {
  tooltip.transition().duration(500).style("opacity", 0);
});
```

### Important: Tooltip visibility via opacity
- Use `opacity: 0` for hidden, `opacity: 0.9` for visible
- Playwright tests check `opacity` not `display` property
- For ETFs: don'"'t show tooltip (keep opacity at 0)

### Labels Inside Bubbles
"'```javascript
svg.selectAll("text.label")
  .data(data)
  .join("text")
  .attr("class", "bubble-label")
  .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
  .attr("dy", "0.35em")
  .text(d => d.ticker)
  .style("font-size", d => Math.min(radius(d) * 0.8, 14) + "px");
```

### Legend
```javascript
const legend = d3.select("#legend");
sectors.forEach(sector => {
  const item = legend.append("div").attr("class", "legend-item");
  item.append("div")
    .attr("class", "legend-color")
    .style("background-color", colorScale(sector));
  item.append("span").text(sector);
});
```

## Data Attributes for Testing
Always add `data-ticker` and `data-sector` attributes to circles and table rows for Playwright selectors.

# Playwright Testing for D3 Visualizations

## Overview
Patterns for testing D3.js visualizations with Playwright, focusing on tooltip behavior, element attributes, and interaction testing.

## Tooltip Testing Patterns

### Checking tooltip visibility via opacity
"'```python
# Playwright typically checks opacity for tooltip visibility
tooltip = page.locator(".tooltip")

# Hover over element
circle.hover()
page.wait_for_timeout(500)  # Wait for transition

# Check tooltip is visible (opacity > 0)
opacity = tooltip.evaluate("el => window.getComputedStyle(el).opacity")
assert float(opacity) > 0

# Check tooltip content
content = tooltip.inner_text()
assert "AAPL" in content
```

### Key insight: opacity-based visibility
- Tests use `opacity` to determine visibility, NOT `display` or `visibility`
- Tooltip should use `style("opacity", 0)` for hidden and `style("opacity", 0.9)` for visible
- Do NOT use `display: none/block` — use opacity transitions only

### Hover interaction
```python
# Find circle by data attribute
circle = page.locator('"'circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
circle.hover()
page.wait_for_timeout(300)

# Verify tooltip appeared
tooltip = page.locator(\".tooltip\")
expect(tooltip).to_have_css(\"opacity\", \"0.9\")
"'```

### ETF tooltip suppression
For ETF entries, the tooltip should remain hidden (opacity 0) on hover:
```python
etf_circle = page.locator('"'circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
etf_circle.hover()
page.wait_for_timeout(300)
tooltip_opacity = tooltip.evaluate(\"el => window.getComputedStyle(el).opacity\")
assert float(tooltip_opacity) == 0  # Should stay hidden
"'```

## Element Selection Patterns
```python
# Select by data attributes
circles = page.locator('"'svg circle[data-ticker]')
rows = page.locator('table tbody tr[data-ticker]')

# Count elements
assert circles.count() == 50

# Check specific attributes
circle = page.locator('circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
sector = circle.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
"'```

## Click Interaction Testing
```python
# Click bubble, check table row highlight
circle.click()
row = page.locator('"'tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
expect(row).to_have_class(/highlighted/)
"'```

## Legend Testing
```python
# Check legend items
legend_items = page.locator('"'.legend-item')
assert legend_items.count() == 5

# Each should have color swatch and text
for i in range(legend_items.count()):
    item = legend_items.nth(i)
    color_div = item.locator('.legend-color')
    assert color_div.count() == 1
    text = item.locator('span')
    assert text.count() == 1
"'```

# CSV Data Processing with D3.js

## Loading CSV Data
"'```javascript
d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(data => {
  // D3 auto-parses CSV headers
  // Access: d.ticker, d.sector, d["full name"], d.marketCap
});
```

## Market Cap Formatting
```javascript
function formatMarketCap(value) {
  if (!value || value === "") return "N/A";
  const num = +value;
  if (num >= 1e12) return (num / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
  if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
  if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
  return num.toFixed(2);
}
```

## Identifying ETFs
ETF entries have `sector === "ETF"` and empty marketCap, country, website fields.

## Data Attributes
For testability, always set:
- `data-ticker` on circles and table rows
- `data-sector` on circles and table rows

# Interactive Data Table with D3.js

## Building a Data Table
"'```javascript
const table = d3.select("#table-container").append("table");
const thead = table.append("thead");
const tbody = table.append("tbody");

// Header row
thead.append("tr")
  .selectAll("th")
  .data(["Ticker", "Name", "Sector", "Market Cap"])
  .join("th")
  .text(d => d);

// Data rows
const rows = tbody.selectAll("tr")
  .data(stocks)
  .join("tr")
  .attr("data-ticker", d => d.ticker)
  .attr("data-sector", d => d.sector);

rows.selectAll("td")
  .data(d => [d.ticker, d.name, d.sector, formatMarketCap(d.marketCap)])
  .join("td")
  .text(d => d);
```

## Bidirectional Highlighting
```javascript
// Click bubble -> highlight table row
circles.on("click", function(event, d) {
  // Remove all highlights
  d3.selectAll("tr.highlighted").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.selectAll("circle.highlighted").classed("highlighted", false);
  
  // Add highlight
  d3.select(this).classed("highlighted", true);
  d3.select(`tr[data-ticker="${d.ticker}"]`).classed("highlighted", true);
  
  // Scroll into view
  document.querySelector(`tr[data-ticker="${d.ticker}"]`).scrollIntoView({block: "center"});
});

// Click table row -> highlight bubble
rows.on("click", function(event, d) {
  d3.selectAll("tr.highlighted").classed("highlighted", false);
  d3.selectAll("circle.highlighted").classed("highlighted", false);
  
  d3.select(this).classed("highlighted", true);
  d3.select(`circle[data-ticker="${d.ticker}"]`).classed("highlighted", true);
});
```

# Single-Page Web App Structure for D3 Visualizations

## File Organization
"'```
output/
├── index.html          # Main HTML page
├── js/
│   ├── d3.v6.min.js    # D3 library
│   └── visualization.js # Custom visualization code
├── css/
│   └── style.css       # Styles
└── data/
    ├── stock-descriptions.csv
    └── indiv-stock/     # Individual stock CSVs
```

## HTML Template
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Stock Visualization</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/style.css">
</head>
<body>
  <h1>Stock Market Visualization</h1>
  <div class="container">
    <div id="bubble-chart"></div>
    <div id="table-container"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="tooltip"></div>
  <script src="js/d3.v6.min.js"></script>
  <script src="js/visualization.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

## CSS Layout (Side by Side)
```css
.container {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  padding: 20px;
}
#bubble-chart { flex: 1; }
#table-container { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 600px; }
```

## Tooltip CSS (opacity-based)
```css
.tooltip {
  position: absolute;
  opacity: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
  color: white;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  pointer-events: none;
  font-size: 13px;
}
```

* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, sans-serif;
  background: #f5f5f5;
  color: #333;
  padding: 20px;
}

h1 {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  font-size: 24px;
  color: #222;
}

.container {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  align-items: flex-start;
}

#bubble-chart {
  flex: 1;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 15px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  min-width: 0;
}

#bubble-chart svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
}

#legend {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  justify-content: center;
}

.legend-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.legend-color {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

#table-container {
  flex: 1;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 15px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  max-height: 650px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 13px;
}

thead th {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  background: #fff;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #ddd;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 600;
}

tbody tr {
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}

tbody tr:hover {
  background: #f0f4ff;
}

tbody tr.highlighted {
  background: #d0e0ff;
  font-weight: 600;
}

tbody td {
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}

circle {
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: stroke-width 0.15s;
}

circle.highlighted {
  stroke: #333;
  stroke-width: 3px;
}

.tooltip {
  position: absolute;
  opacity: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  pointer-events: none;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  max-width: 300px;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.bubble-label {
  pointer-events: none;
  text-anchor: middle;
  dominant-baseline: central;
  fill: #fff;
  font-weight: 600;
}
CSS_EOF

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_34","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'PYEOF'
js_code = r'''(function() {
  const width = 600;
  const height = 550;
  const sectors = [\"Information Technology\", \"Industry\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"ETF\"];
  const colorScale = d3.scaleOrdinal()
    .domain(sectors)
    .range([\"#4e79a7\", \"#f28e2b\", \"#e15759\", \"#76b7b2\", \"#59a14f\"]);

  // Sector cluster centers (arranged in a grid-like pattern)
  const sectorPositions = {
    \"Information Technology\": { x: width * 0.3, y: height * 0.3 },
    \"Industry\": { x: width * 0.7, y: height * 0.3 },
    \"Energy\": { x: width * 0.3, y: height * 0.7 },
    \"Financial\": { x: width * 0.7, y: height * 0.7 },
    \"ETF\": { x: width * 0.5, y: height * 0.5 }
  };

  // Tooltip reference
  const tooltip = d3.select(\".tooltip\");

  // Legend
  const legend = d3.select(\"#legend\");
  sectors.forEach(function(sector) {
    var item = legend.append(\"div\").attr(\"class\", \"legend-item\");
    item.append(\"div\")
      .attr(\"class\", \"legend-color\")
      .style(\"background-color\", colorScale(sector));
    item.append(\"span\").text(sector);
  });

  // Format market cap
  function formatMarketCap(value) {
    if ("'!value || value === "" || isNaN(+value)) return "N/A";
    var num = +value;
    if (num >= 1e12) return (num / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
    if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
    if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
    return num.toFixed(2);
  }

  // Load data
  d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(data) {
    // Radius scale based on market cap
    var nonEtfData = data.filter(function(d) { return d.sector !== "ETF"; });
    var mcValues = nonEtfData.map(function(d) { return +d.marketCap; }).filter(function(v) { return !isNaN(v) && v > 0; });

    var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
      .domain([0, d3.max(mcValues)])
      .range([8, 50]);

    var etfRadius = 15;

    function getRadius(d) {
      if (d.sector === "ETF" || !d.marketCap || d.marketCap === "") return etfRadius;
      return radiusScale(+d.marketCap);
    }

    // Create SVG
    var svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")
      .append("svg")
      .attr("width", width)
      .attr("height", height);

    // Initialize positions near sector centers
    data.forEach(function(d) {
      var pos = sectorPositions[d.sector] || { x: width / 2, y: height / 2 };
      d.x = pos.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
      d.y = pos.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
    });

    // Create circles
    var circles = svg.selectAll("circle")
      .data(data)
      .join("circle")
      .attr("r", function(d) { return getRadius(d); })
      .attr("fill", function(d) { return colorScale(d.sector); })
      .attr("stroke", "#fff")
      .attr("stroke-width", 1.5)
      .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
      .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; });

    // Tooltip events
    circles.on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
      if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
      tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0.9);
      tooltip.html("<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" + d["full name"] + "<br>Sector: " + d.sector)
        .style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
        .style("top", (event.pageY - 28) + "px");
    });

    circles.on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
      if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
      tooltip.style("left", (event.pageX + 10) + "px")
        .style("top", (event.pageY - 28) + "px");
    });

    circles.on("mouseout", function(event, d) {
      tooltip.transition().duration(200).style("opacity", 0);
    });

    // Click for highlighting
    circles.on("click", function(event, d) {
      d3.selectAll("circle.highlighted").classed("highlighted", false);
      d3.selectAll("tr.highlighted").classed("highlighted", false);
      d3.select(this).classed("highlighted", true);
      var row = document.querySelector("tr[data-ticker='"\\\"\" + d.ticker + \"\\\"]\");
      if (row) {
        row.classList.add(\"highlighted\");
        row.scrollIntoView({ block: \"center\", behavior: \"smooth\" });
      }
    });

    // Labels
    var labels = svg.selectAll(\"text.bubble-label\")
      .data(data)
      .join(\"text\")
      .attr(\"class\", \"bubble-label\")
      .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; })
      .style(\"font-size\", function(d) {
        var r = getRadius(d);
        return Math.max(Math.min(r * 0.7, 13), 7) + \"px\";
      });

    // Force simulation
    var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(data)
      .force(\"x\", d3.forceX(function(d) {
        return (sectorPositions[d.sector] || { x: width / 2 }).x;
      }).strength(0.4))
      .force(\"y\", d3.forceY(function(d) {
        return (sectorPositions[d.sector] || { y: height / 2 }).y;
      }).strength(0.4))
      .force(\"collide\", d3.forceCollide(function(d) {
        return getRadius(d) + 2;
      }).iterations(3))
      .on(\"tick\", function() {
        circles
          .attr(\"cx\", function(d) { return d.x = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(width - getRadius(d), d.x)); })
          .attr(\"cy\", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(getRadius(d), Math.min(height - getRadius(d), d.y)); });
        labels
          .attr(\"x\", function(d) { return d.x; })
          .attr(\"y\", function(d) { return d.y; });
      });

    // Build table
    var tableContainer = d3.select(\"#table-container\");
    var table = tableContainer.append(\"table\");
    var thead = table.append(\"thead\");
    var tbody = table.append(\"tbody\");

    thead.append(\"tr\")
      .selectAll(\"th\")
      .data([\"Ticker\", \"Name\", \"Sector\", \"Market Cap\"])
      .join(\"th\")
      .text(function(d) { return d; });

    var rows = tbody.selectAll(\"tr\")
      .data(data)
      .join(\"tr\")
      .attr(\"data-ticker\", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
      .attr(\"data-sector\", function(d) { return d.sector; });

    rows.each(function(d) {
      var row = d3.select(this);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.ticker);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d[\"full name\"]);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.sector);
      row.append(\"td\").text(formatMarketCap(d.marketCap));
    });

    // Table row click -> highlight bubble
    rows.on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
      d3.selectAll(\"circle.highlighted\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
      d3.selectAll(\"tr.highlighted\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
      d3.select(this).classed(\"highlighted\", true);
      d3.select(\"circle[data-ticker=\\\"\" + d.ticker + \"\\\"]\").classed(\"highlighted\", true);
    });
  });
})();
'''

with open('/root/output/js/visualization.js', 'w') as f:
    f.write(js_code)

print(\"visualization.js created, length:\", len(js_code))
PYEOF"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

3. ETF hover: tooltip stays at opacity 0

    \"\"\")
