\"\"\"Quick test to verify tooltip behavior matches expected Playwright patterns.\"\"\"
import http.server
import socketserver
import threading
import os
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect

OUTPUT_DIR = \"/root/output\"
PORT = 8799

def test_tooltip():
    os.chdir(OUTPUT_DIR)
    httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler)
    server_thread = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
    server_thread.start()

    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page()

        # Capture console
        def handle_console(msg):
            print(f\"  [CONSOLE {msg.type}] {msg.text}\")
        page.on(\"console\", handle_console)
        def handle_error(err):
            print(f\"  [ERROR] {err}\")
        page.on(\"pageerror\", handle_error)

        page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=30000)

        # Wait for circles
        page.wait_for_selector('svg circle', timeout=10000)
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)  # Let force settle

        # Count circles
        circle_count = page.locator('svg circle').count()
        print(f\"Circles: {circle_count}\")

        # Check tooltip element exists
        tooltip = page.locator('#tooltip')
        print(f\"Tooltip exists: {tooltip.count()}\")

        # Check initial tooltip state
        opacity = tooltip.evaluate(\"el => getComputedStyle(el).opacity\")
        print(f\"Initial tooltip opacity: {opacity}\")

        # Test 1: Hover non-ETF (AAPL)
        aapl = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        print(f\"AAPL found: {aapl.count()}\")
        aapl.hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)

        opacity_after = tooltip.evaluate(\"el => getComputedStyle(el).opacity\")
        print(f\"After AAPL hover, tooltip opacity: {opacity_after}\")
        text = tooltip.inner_text()
        print(f\"Tooltip text: {repr(text)}\")

        # Playwright visibility check
        expect(tooltip).to_be_visible()
        print(\"PASS: tooltip visible after AAPL hover\")

        # Check content
        expect(tooltip).to_contain_text(\"AAPL\")
        print(\"PASS: tooltip contains AAPL\")
        expect(tooltip).to_contain_text(\"Apple\")
        print(\"PASS: tooltip contains Apple\")
        expect(tooltip).to_contain_text(\"Sector\")
        print(\"PASS: tooltip contains Sector\")

        # Test 2: Hover ETF (SPY)
        spy = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        print(f\"\\nSPY found: {spy.count()}\")
        spy.hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)

        opacity_etf = tooltip.evaluate(\"el => getComputedStyle(el).opacity\")
        print(f\"After SPY hover, tooltip opacity: {opacity_etf}\")

        expect(tooltip).not_to_be_visible()
        print(\"PASS: tooltip NOT visible after SPY hover\")

        # Test 3: Hover another non-ETF then ETF to check transition
        msft = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        msft.hover(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)

The key insight: Playwright's `to_be_visible()` doesn't just check opacity. It checks the element's bounding box and whether it's in the viewport. I need to use `display: none` or `visibility: hidden` instead of (or in addition to) opacity."}}

(function() {
  \"use strict\";

  var chartWidth = 650;
  var chartHeight = 550;
  var ETF_RADIUS = 12;

  function formatMarketCap(val) {
    if ("'!val || isNaN(val)) return "N/A";
    var n = +val;
    if (n >= 1e12) return (n / 1e12).toFixed(2) + "T";
    if (n >= 1e9) return (n / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
    if (n >= 1e6) return (n / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
    return n.toFixed(2);
  }

  var sectorColors = {
    "Information Technology": "#4e79a7",
    "Industry": "#f28e2b",
    "Energy": "#e15759",
    "Financial": "#76b7b2",
    "ETF": "#59a14f"
  };

  var sectorList = ["Information Technology", "Industry", "Energy", "Financial", "ETF"];

  function getSectorCenter(sector) {
    var positions = {
      "Information Technology": { x: 0.3, y: 0.35 },
      "Industry":              { x: 0.7, y: 0.35 },
      "Energy":                { x: 0.2, y: 0.7 },
      "Financial":             { x: 0.5, y: 0.7 },
      "ETF":                   { x: 0.8, y: 0.7 }
    };
    var p = positions[sector] || { x: 0.5, y: 0.5 };
    return { x: p.x * chartWidth, y: p.y * chartHeight };
  }

  function showTooltip(tooltip, html, event) {
    tooltip
      .style("visibility", "visible")
      .style("opacity", "1")
      .html(html)
      .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
      .style("top", (event.pageY - 12) + "px");
  }

  function hideTooltip(tooltip) {
    tooltip
      .style("visibility", "hidden")
      .style("opacity", "0");
  }

  d3.csv("data/stock-descriptions.csv").then(function(rawData) {
    var data = rawData.map(function(d) {
      return {
        ticker: d.ticker,
        name: d["full name"],
        sector: d.sector,
        marketCap: d.marketCap ? +d.marketCap : null,
        country: d.country || null,
        website: d.website || null
      };
    });

    var nonEtfData = data.filter(function(d) { return d.sector !== "ETF"; });
    var radiusScale = d3.scaleSqrt()
      .domain([0, d3.max(nonEtfData, function(d) { return d.marketCap; })])
      .range([8, 45]);

    var nodes = data.map(function(d) {
      var r;
      if (d.sector === "ETF" || !d.marketCap) {
        r = ETF_RADIUS;
      } else {
        r = radiusScale(d.marketCap);
      }
      var center = getSectorCenter(d.sector);
      return {
        ticker: d.ticker,
        name: d.name,
        sector: d.sector,
        marketCap: d.marketCap,
        country: d.country,
        website: d.website,
        radius: r,
        x: center.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30,
        y: center.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30
      };
    });

    var svg = d3.select("#bubble-chart")
      .attr("width", chartWidth)
      .attr("height", chartHeight)
      .attr("viewBox", "0 0 " + chartWidth + " " + chartHeight);

    var tooltip = d3.select("#tooltip");

    var circles = svg.selectAll("circle")
      .data(nodes)
      .join("circle")
      .attr("r", function(d) { return d.radius; })
      .attr("fill", function(d) { return sectorColors[d.sector]; })
      .attr("data-ticker", function(d) { return d.ticker; })
      .attr("data-sector", function(d) { return d.sector; })
      .attr("cx", function(d) { return d.x; })
      .attr("cy", function(d) { return d.y; });

    circles.on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
        if (d.sector === "ETF") {
          hideTooltip(tooltip);
          return;
        }
        showTooltip(
          tooltip,
          "<strong>" + d.ticker + "</strong><br>" +
          d.name + "<br>" +
          "Sector: " + d.sector,
          event
        );
      })
      .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
        if (d.sector === "ETF") return;
        tooltip
          .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
          .style("top", (event.pageY - 12) + "px");
      })
      .on("mouseout", function() {
        hideTooltip(tooltip);
      });

    circles.on("click", function(event, d) {
      d3.selectAll("circle").classed("highlighted", false);
      d3.select(this).classed("highlighted", true);
      d3.selectAll("#data-table tbody tr").classed("highlighted", false);
      d3.select('"'#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]')
        .classed(\"highlighted\", true);
      var row = document.querySelector('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]');
      if (row) row.scrollIntoView({ block: \"center\", behavior: \"smooth\" });
    });

    var labels = svg.selectAll(\"text.bubble-label\")
      .data(nodes)
      .join(\"text\")
      .attr(\"class\", \"bubble-label\")
      .text(function(d) { return d.ticker; })
      .attr(\"x\", function(d) { return d.x; })
      .attr(\"y\", function(d) { return d.y; })
      .style(\"font-size\", function(d) {
        return Math.max(7, Math.min(d.radius * 0.55, 12)) + \"px\";
      });

    var simulation = d3.forceSimulation(nodes)
      .force(\"x\", d3.forceX(function(d) { return getSectorCenter(d.sector).x; }).strength(0.3))
      .force(\"y\", d3.forceY(function(d) { return getSectorCenter(d.sector).y; }).strength(0.3))
      .force(\"collide\", d3.forceCollide(function(d) { return d.radius + 2; }).strength(1).iterations(3))
      .force(\"charge\", d3.forceManyBody().strength(-3))
      .on(\"tick\", function() {
        circles
          .attr(\"cx\", function(d) { return d.x = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(chartWidth - d.radius, d.x)); })
          .attr(\"cy\", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(chartHeight - d.radius, d.y)); });
        labels
          .attr(\"x\", function(d) { return d.x; })
          .attr(\"y\", function(d) { return d.y; });
      });

    var legend = d3.select(\"#legend\");
    sectorList.forEach(function(sector) {
      var item = legend.append(\"div\").attr(\"class\", \"legend-item\");
      item.append(\"div\")
        .attr(\"class\", \"legend-color\")
        .style(\"background-color\", sectorColors[sector]);
      item.append(\"span\").text(sector);
    });

    var thead = d3.select(\"#data-table thead\");
    var tbody = d3.select(\"#data-table tbody\");

    thead.append(\"tr\").selectAll(\"th\")
      .data([\"Ticker symbol\", \"Full company name\", \"Sector\", \"Market cap\"])
      .join(\"th\")
      .text(function(d) { return d; });

    var rows = tbody.selectAll(\"tr\")
      .data(data)
      .join(\"tr\")
      .attr(\"data-ticker\", function(d) { return d.ticker; });

    rows.each(function(d) {
      var row = d3.select(this);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.ticker);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.name);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.sector);
      row.append(\"td\").text(formatMarketCap(d.marketCap));
    });

    rows.on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
      d3.selectAll(\"#data-table tbody tr\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
      d3.select(this).classed(\"highlighted\", true);
      d3.selectAll(\"circle\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
      d3.select('circle[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]')
        .classed(\"highlighted\", true);
    });

  }).catch(function(error) {
    console.error(\"Error loading data:\", error);
  });

})();

          .attr(\"cy\", function(d) { return d.y = Math.max(d.radius, Math.min(chartHeight - d.radius, d.y)); });
        labels
          .attr(\"x\", function(d) { return d.x; })
          .attr(\"y\", function(d) { return d.y; });
      });

    var legend = d3.select(\"#legend\");
    sectorList.forEach(function(sector) {
      var item = legend.append(\"div\").attr(\"class\", \"legend-item\");
      item.append(\"div\")
        .attr(\"class\", \"legend-color\")
        .style(\"background-color\", sectorColors[sector]);
      item.append(\"span\").text(sector);
    });

    var thead = d3.select(\"#data-table thead\");
    var tbody = d3.select(\"#data-table tbody\");

    thead.append(\"tr\").selectAll(\"th\")
      .data([\"Ticker symbol\", \"Full company name\", \"Sector\", \"Market cap\"])
      .join(\"th\")
      .text(function(d) { return d; });

    var rows = tbody.selectAll(\"tr\")
      .data(data)
      .join(\"tr\")
      .attr(\"data-ticker\", function(d) { return d.ticker; });

    rows.each(function(d) {
      var row = d3.select(this);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.ticker);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.name);
      row.append(\"td\").text(d.sector);
      row.append(\"td\").text(formatMarketCap(d.marketCap));
    });

    rows.on(\"click\", function(event, d) {
      d3.selectAll(\"#data-table tbody tr\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
      d3.select(this).classed(\"highlighted\", true);
      d3.selectAll(\"circle\").classed(\"highlighted\", false);
      d3.select('circle[data-ticker=\"' + d.ticker + '\"]')
        .classed(\"highlighted\", true);
    });

  }).catch(function(error) {
    console.error(\"Error loading data:\", error);
  });

})();

import http.server
import socketserver
import threading
import os
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect

OUTPUT_DIR = \"/root/output\"
PORT = 8801

def run_tests():
    os.chdir(OUTPUT_DIR)
    httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler)
    server_thread = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
    server_thread.start()

    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page()
        page.on(\"console\", lambda msg: print(f\"  [{msg.type}] {msg.text}\"))
        page.on(\"pageerror\", lambda err: print(f\"  [ERROR] {err}\"))

        page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=30000)
        page.wait_for_selector('svg circle', timeout=10000)
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)

        passed = 0
        failed = 0

        # 1. File structure
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 1: File structure ===\")
        for f in [\"index.html\", \"js/d3.v6.min.js\", \"js/visualization.js\", \"css/style.css\"]:
            exists = os.path.exists(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f))
            print(f\"  {f}: {'OK' if exists else 'MISSING'}\")
        data_files = os.listdir(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"data\", \"indiv-stock\"))
        print(f\"  data/indiv-stock files: {len(data_files)}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 2. D3 loaded
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 2: D3 loaded ===\")
        d3_loaded = page.evaluate(\"typeof d3 "'!== '"'undefined'\")
        print(f\"  D3 loaded: {d3_loaded}\")
        assert d3_loaded, \"D3 not loaded\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 3. Bubble chart - 50 circles
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 3: Bubble chart circles ===\")
        circles = page.locator('svg circle')
        count = circles.count()
        print(f\"  Circle count: {count}\")
        assert count == 50, f\"Expected 50 circles, got {count}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 4. Data attributes
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 4: Data attributes ===\")
        aapl = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        assert aapl.count() == 1
        sector = aapl.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        print(f\"  AAPL data-sector: {sector}\")
        assert sector == \"Information Technology\"
        spy = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        assert spy.count() == 1
        spy_sector = spy.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        print(f\"  SPY data-sector: {spy_sector}\")
        assert spy_sector == \"ETF\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 5. Bubble labels (ticker text inside)
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 5: Bubble labels ===\")
        labels = page.locator('svg text.bubble-label')
        label_count = labels.count()
        print(f\"  Label count: {label_count}\")
        assert label_count == 50, f\"Expected 50 labels, got {label_count}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 6. Data table
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 6: Data table ===\")
        table_rows = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr')
        row_count = table_rows.count()
        print(f\"  Table rows: {row_count}\")
        assert row_count == 50, f\"Expected 50 rows, got {row_count}\"
        # Check headers
        headers = page.locator('#data-table thead th')
        header_texts = [headers.nth(i).inner_text() for i in range(headers.count())]
        print(f\"  Headers: {header_texts}\")
        assert \"Ticker symbol\" in header_texts
        assert \"Market cap\" in header_texts
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 7. Market cap formatting
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 7: Market cap formatting ===\")
        amzn_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"AMZN\"]')
        cells = amzn_row.locator('td')
        mcap_text = cells.nth(3).inner_text()
        print(f\"  AMZN market cap: {mcap_text}\")
        assert \"T\" in mcap_text or \"B\" in mcap_text, f\"Market cap not formatted: {mcap_text}\"
        # ETF should show N/A
        spy_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        spy_mcap = spy_row.locator('td').nth(3).inner_text()
        print(f\"  SPY market cap: {spy_mcap}\")
        assert spy_mcap == \"N/A\", f\"ETF market cap should be N/A, got {spy_mcap}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 8. Legend
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 8: Legend ===\")
        legend_items = page.locator('.legend-item')
        legend_count = legend_items.count()
        print(f\"  Legend items: {legend_count}\")
        assert legend_count == 5, f\"Expected 5 legend items, got {legend_count}\"
        for i in range(legend_count):
            item = legend_items.nth(i)
            color_el = item.locator('.legend-color')
            span_el = item.locator('span')
            assert color_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing .legend-color\"
            assert span_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing span\"
            text = span_el.inner_text()
            print(f\"  Legend {i}: {text}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 9. Sector clustering
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 9: Sector clustering ===\")
        # Check that same-sector bubbles are closer together than different-sector
        it_circles = page.locator('svg circle[data-sector=\"Information Technology\"]')
        it_count = it_circles.count()
        print(f\"  IT circles: {it_count}\")
        positions = {}
        for sector in [\"Information Technology\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"ETF\"]:
            sel = f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]'
            els = page.locator(sel)
            cnt = els.count()
            xs = []
            ys = []
            for j in range(cnt):
                el = els.nth(j)
                cx = float(el.get_attribute(\"cx\"))
                cy = float(el.get_attribute(\"cy\"))
                xs.append(cx)
                ys.append(cy)
            avg_x = sum(xs)/len(xs) if xs else 0
            avg_y = sum(ys)/len(ys) if ys else 0
            positions[sector] = (avg_x, avg_y)
            print(f\"  {sector}: avg=({avg_x:.0f},{avg_y:.0f}), count={cnt}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 10. Interactive linking (click bubble -> highlight row)
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 10: Interactive linking ===\")
        aapl_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        aapl_circle.click(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        aapl_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        has_highlight = aapl_row.evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"  AAPL row highlighted after circle click: {has_highlight}\")
        assert has_highlight, \"Row not highlighted after circle click\"
        # Click row -> highlight circle
        msft_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        msft_row.click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        msft_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        circle_highlighted = msft_circle.evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"  MSFT circle highlighted after row click: {circle_highlighted}\")
        assert circle_highlighted, \"Circle not highlighted after row click\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # Take screenshot
        os.makedirs(\"/logs/verifier\", exist_ok=True)
        page.screenshot(path=\"/logs/verifier/visualization.png\", full_page=True)
        print(\"\\nScreenshot saved\")

        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"RESULTS: {passed}/{passed+failed} passed\")
        print(f\"{'='*40}\")

        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

if __name__ == \"__main__\":
    run_tests()

        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 8. Legend
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 8: Legend ===\")
        legend_items = page.locator('.legend-item')
        legend_count = legend_items.count()
        print(f\"  Legend items: {legend_count}\")
        assert legend_count == 5, f\"Expected 5 legend items, got {legend_count}\"
        for i in range(legend_count):
            item = legend_items.nth(i)
            color_el = item.locator('.legend-color')
            span_el = item.locator('span')
            assert color_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing .legend-color\"
            assert span_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing span\"
            text = span_el.inner_text()
            print(f\"  Legend {i}: {text}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 9. Sector clustering
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 9: Sector clustering ===\")
        # Check that same-sector bubbles are closer together than different-sector
        it_circles = page.locator('svg circle[data-sector=\"Information Technology\"]')
        it_count = it_circles.count()
        print(f\"  IT circles: {it_count}\")
        positions = {}
        for sector in [\"Information Technology\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"ETF\"]:
            sel = f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]'
            els = page.locator(sel)
            cnt = els.count()
            xs = []
            ys = []
            for j in range(cnt):
                el = els.nth(j)
                cx = float(el.get_attribute(\"cx\"))
                cy = float(el.get_attribute(\"cy\"))
                xs.append(cx)
                ys.append(cy)
            avg_x = sum(xs)/len(xs) if xs else 0
            avg_y = sum(ys)/len(ys) if ys else 0
            positions[sector] = (avg_x, avg_y)
            print(f\"  {sector}: avg=({avg_x:.0f},{avg_y:.0f}), count={cnt}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 10. Interactive linking (click bubble -> highlight row)
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 10: Interactive linking ===\")
        aapl_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        aapl_circle.click(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        aapl_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        has_highlight = aapl_row.evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"  AAPL row highlighted after circle click: {has_highlight}\")
        assert has_highlight, \"Row not highlighted after circle click\"
        # Click row -> highlight circle
        msft_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        msft_row.click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        msft_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        circle_highlighted = msft_circle.evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"  MSFT circle highlighted after row click: {circle_highlighted}\")
        assert circle_highlighted, \"Circle not highlighted after row click\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # Take screenshot
        os.makedirs(\"/logs/verifier\", exist_ok=True)
        page.screenshot(path=\"/logs/verifier/visualization.png\", full_page=True)
        print(\"\\nScreenshot saved\")

        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"RESULTS: {passed}/{passed+failed} passed\")
        print(f\"{'='*40}\")

        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

if __name__ == \"__main__\":
    run_tests()

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_48","type":"agent_message","text":"

Everything looks great. The visualization renders cleanly with all requirements met.

**What was built**

- `output/index.html` — single-page dashboard with side-by-side layout
- `output/js/visualization.js` — D3 v6 force-simulation bubble chart + data table with full interactivity
- `output/js/d3.v6.min.js` — local D3 v6 library
- `output/css/style.css` — responsive styling
- `output/data/` — copied input CSV files

**Key features**
- Bubble chart with 50 circles sized by market cap (ETFs uniform), colored by sector, clustered via `forceX`/`forceY` with `forceCollide` preventing overlap
- Ticker labels inside each bubble
- Tooltip on hover showing ticker, name, and sector (suppressed for ETFs)
- Legend with all 5 sectors
- Data table with formatted market cap (e.g., "1.64T", "193.22B", "N/A" for ETFs)
- Bidirectional click highlighting between bubbles and table rows

**Root cause of previous failures**

The tooltip used `opacity: 0` to hide, but Playwright's `to_be_visible()` considers `opacity: 0` elements as **still visible**. Only `visibility: hidden` (or `display: none`) makes elements invisible to Playwright. The fix was switching to `visibility: hidden/visible` for tooltip show/hide."}}

\"\"\"Comprehensive verification of all requirements.\"\"\"
import http.server
import socketserver
import threading
import os
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect

OUTPUT_DIR = \"/root/output\"
PORT = 8801

def run_tests():
    os.chdir(OUTPUT_DIR)
    httpd = socketserver.TCPServer((\"\", PORT), http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler)
    server_thread = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever, daemon=True)
    server_thread.start()

    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page()
        page.on(\"console\", lambda msg: print(f\"  [{msg.type}] {msg.text}\"))
        page.on(\"pageerror\", lambda err: print(f\"  [ERROR] {err}\"))

        page.goto(f\"http://localhost:{PORT}/index.html\", wait_until=\"load\", timeout=30000)
        page.wait_for_selector('svg circle', timeout=10000)
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)

        passed = 0
        failed = 0

        # 1. File structure
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 1: File structure ===\")
        for f in [\"index.html\", \"js/d3.v6.min.js\", \"js/visualization.js\", \"css/style.css\"]:
            exists = os.path.exists(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f))
            print(f\"  {f}: {'OK' if exists else 'MISSING'}\")
        data_files = os.listdir(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"data\", \"indiv-stock\"))
        print(f\"  data/indiv-stock files: {len(data_files)}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 2. D3 loaded
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 2: D3 loaded ===\")
        d3_loaded = page.evaluate(\"typeof d3 "'!== '"'undefined'\")
        print(f\"  D3 loaded: {d3_loaded}\")
        assert d3_loaded, \"D3 not loaded\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 3. Bubble chart - 50 circles
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 3: Bubble chart circles ===\")
        circles = page.locator('svg circle')
        count = circles.count()
        print(f\"  Circle count: {count}\")
        assert count == 50, f\"Expected 50 circles, got {count}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 4. Data attributes
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 4: Data attributes ===\")
        aapl = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        assert aapl.count() == 1
        sector = aapl.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        print(f\"  AAPL data-sector: {sector}\")
        assert sector == \"Information Technology\"
        spy = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        assert spy.count() == 1
        spy_sector = spy.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        print(f\"  SPY data-sector: {spy_sector}\")
        assert spy_sector == \"ETF\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 5. Bubble labels (ticker text inside)
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 5: Bubble labels ===\")
        labels = page.locator('svg text.bubble-label')
        label_count = labels.count()
        print(f\"  Label count: {label_count}\")
        assert label_count == 50, f\"Expected 50 labels, got {label_count}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 6. Data table
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 6: Data table ===\")
        table_rows = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr')
        row_count = table_rows.count()
        print(f\"  Table rows: {row_count}\")
        assert row_count == 50, f\"Expected 50 rows, got {row_count}\"
        # Check headers
        headers = page.locator('#data-table thead th')
        header_texts = [headers.nth(i).inner_text() for i in range(headers.count())]
        print(f\"  Headers: {header_texts}\")
        assert \"Ticker symbol\" in header_texts
        assert \"Market cap\" in header_texts
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 7. Market cap formatting
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 7: Market cap formatting ===\")
        amzn_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"AMZN\"]')
        cells = amzn_row.locator('td')
        mcap_text = cells.nth(3).inner_text()
        print(f\"  AMZN market cap: {mcap_text}\")
        assert \"T\" in mcap_text or \"B\" in mcap_text, f\"Market cap not formatted: {mcap_text}\"
        # ETF should show N/A
        spy_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        spy_mcap = spy_row.locator('td').nth(3).inner_text()
        print(f\"  SPY market cap: {spy_mcap}\")
        assert spy_mcap == \"N/A\", f\"ETF market cap should be N/A, got {spy_mcap}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 8. Legend
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 8: Legend ===\")
        legend_items = page.locator('.legend-item')
        legend_count = legend_items.count()
        print(f\"  Legend items: {legend_count}\")
        assert legend_count == 5, f\"Expected 5 legend items, got {legend_count}\"
        for i in range(legend_count):
            item = legend_items.nth(i)
            color_el = item.locator('.legend-color')
            span_el = item.locator('span')
            assert color_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing .legend-color\"
            assert span_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing span\"
            text = span_el.inner_text()
            print(f\"  Legend {i}: {text}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 9. Sector clustering
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 9: Sector clustering ===\")
        # Check that same-sector bubbles are closer together than different-sector
        it_circles = page.locator('svg circle[data-sector=\"Information Technology\"]')
        it_count = it_circles.count()
        print(f\"  IT circles: {it_count}\")
        positions = {}
        for sector in [\"Information Technology\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"ETF\"]:
            sel = f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]'
            els = page.locator(sel)
            cnt = els.count()
            xs = []
            ys = []
            for j in range(cnt):
                el = els.nth(j)
                cx = float(el.get_attribute(\"cx\"))
                cy = float(el.get_attribute(\"cy\"))
                xs.append(cx)
                ys.append(cy)
            avg_x = sum(xs)/len(xs) if xs else 0
            avg_y = sum(ys)/len(ys) if ys else 0

        count = circles.count()
        print(f\"  Circle count: {count}\")
        assert count == 50, f\"Expected 50 circles, got {count}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 4. Data attributes
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 4: Data attributes ===\")
        aapl = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        assert aapl.count() == 1
        sector = aapl.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        print(f\"  AAPL data-sector: {sector}\")
        assert sector == \"Information Technology\"
        spy = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        assert spy.count() == 1
        spy_sector = spy.get_attribute(\"data-sector\")
        print(f\"  SPY data-sector: {spy_sector}\")
        assert spy_sector == \"ETF\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 5. Bubble labels (ticker text inside)
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 5: Bubble labels ===\")
        labels = page.locator('svg text.bubble-label')
        label_count = labels.count()
        print(f\"  Label count: {label_count}\")
        assert label_count == 50, f\"Expected 50 labels, got {label_count}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 6. Data table
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 6: Data table ===\")
        table_rows = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr')
        row_count = table_rows.count()
        print(f\"  Table rows: {row_count}\")
        assert row_count == 50, f\"Expected 50 rows, got {row_count}\"
        # Check headers
        headers = page.locator('#data-table thead th')
        header_texts = [headers.nth(i).inner_text() for i in range(headers.count())]
        print(f\"  Headers: {header_texts}\")
        assert \"Ticker symbol\" in header_texts
        assert \"Market cap\" in header_texts
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 7. Market cap formatting
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 7: Market cap formatting ===\")
        amzn_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"AMZN\"]')
        cells = amzn_row.locator('td')
        mcap_text = cells.nth(3).inner_text()
        print(f\"  AMZN market cap: {mcap_text}\")
        assert \"T\" in mcap_text or \"B\" in mcap_text, f\"Market cap not formatted: {mcap_text}\"
        # ETF should show N/A
        spy_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"SPY\"]')
        spy_mcap = spy_row.locator('td').nth(3).inner_text()
        print(f\"  SPY market cap: {spy_mcap}\")
        assert spy_mcap == \"N/A\", f\"ETF market cap should be N/A, got {spy_mcap}\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 8. Legend
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 8: Legend ===\")
        legend_items = page.locator('.legend-item')
        legend_count = legend_items.count()
        print(f\"  Legend items: {legend_count}\")
        assert legend_count == 5, f\"Expected 5 legend items, got {legend_count}\"
        for i in range(legend_count):
            item = legend_items.nth(i)
            color_el = item.locator('.legend-color')
            span_el = item.locator('span')
            assert color_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing .legend-color\"
            assert span_el.count() == 1, f\"Legend item {i} missing span\"
            text = span_el.inner_text()
            print(f\"  Legend {i}: {text}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 9. Sector clustering
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 9: Sector clustering ===\")
        # Check that same-sector bubbles are closer together than different-sector
        it_circles = page.locator('svg circle[data-sector=\"Information Technology\"]')
        it_count = it_circles.count()
        print(f\"  IT circles: {it_count}\")
        positions = {}
        for sector in [\"Information Technology\", \"Energy\", \"Financial\", \"Industry\", \"ETF\"]:
            sel = f'svg circle[data-sector=\"{sector}\"]'
            els = page.locator(sel)
            cnt = els.count()
            xs = []
            ys = []
            for j in range(cnt):
                el = els.nth(j)
                cx = float(el.get_attribute(\"cx\"))
                cy = float(el.get_attribute(\"cy\"))
                xs.append(cx)
                ys.append(cy)
            avg_x = sum(xs)/len(xs) if xs else 0
            avg_y = sum(ys)/len(ys) if ys else 0
            positions[sector] = (avg_x, avg_y)
            print(f\"  {sector}: avg=({avg_x:.0f},{avg_y:.0f}), count={cnt}\")
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # 10. Interactive linking (click bubble -> highlight row)
        print(\"\\n=== TEST 10: Interactive linking ===\")
        aapl_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        aapl_circle.click(force=True)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        aapl_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"AAPL\"]')
        has_highlight = aapl_row.evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"  AAPL row highlighted after circle click: {has_highlight}\")
        assert has_highlight, \"Row not highlighted after circle click\"
        # Click row -> highlight circle
        msft_row = page.locator('#data-table tbody tr[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        msft_row.click()
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        msft_circle = page.locator('svg circle[data-ticker=\"MSFT\"]')
        circle_highlighted = msft_circle.evaluate(\"el => el.classList.contains('highlighted')\")
        print(f\"  MSFT circle highlighted after row click: {circle_highlighted}\")
        assert circle_highlighted, \"Circle not highlighted after row click\"
        passed += 1
        print(\"PASS\")

        # Take screenshot
        os.makedirs(\"/logs/verifier\", exist_ok=True)
        page.screenshot(path=\"/logs/verifier/visualization.png\", full_page=True)
        print(\"\\nScreenshot saved\")

        print(f\"\\n{'='*40}\")
        print(f\"RESULTS: {passed}/{passed+failed} passed\")
        print(f\"{'='*40}\")

        browser.close()
    httpd.shutdown()

if __name__ == \"__main__\":
